title: On topological frustration and graphene magnonics
summary: The graph-theoretic topological frustration is a peculiar situation on a finite piece of the honeycomb lattice that prevents a full pairwise coupling of the lattice sites via nearest neighbor links, even when the total number of sites is an even number. This type of frustration is inherent for organic molecules that are classified as concealed non-Kekulean hydrocarbons, representing peculiar diradicals. Here we show that this topological frustration persists in 2D systems based on honeycomb lattice. Such systems exhibit fully flat electronic energy bands located at the Fermi level. Therefore, 2D ultimately flat bands can be systematically and predictably constructed for graphene monolayer nanomeshes. These systems are prone to antiferromagnetic ordering and hybrid spin-wave excitations mixing weak ferromagnetic and strong antiferromagnetic features, which could pave the way towards low-power, compact, and ultrafast organic spintronics with near room-temperature operation.

AI.tldr: 该论文展示了蜂窝晶格中的拓扑阻挫现象在二维系统中持续存在，导致完全平坦的电子能带位于费米能级，可用于系统构建石墨烯单层纳米网的超平坦能带，这些系统倾向于反铁磁有序和混合自旋波激发。
AI.motivation: 研究蜂窝晶格中的拓扑阻挫现象在二维系统中的持续存在，探索其在有机自旋电子学中的应用潜力，特别是构建具有超平坦能带的石墨烯纳米结构。
AI.method: 基于图论的拓扑阻挫分析，研究蜂窝晶格在二维系统中的性质，构建石墨烯单层纳米网结构，分析其电子能带结构和磁性特征。
AI.result: 发现拓扑阻挫在二维蜂窝晶格系统中持续存在，导致完全平坦的电子能带位于费米能级；这些系统表现出反铁磁有序和混合自旋波激发，混合了弱铁磁和强反铁磁特征。
AI.conclusion: 二维超平坦能带可以系统且可预测地构建于石墨烯单层纳米网中，这些系统为低功耗、紧凑、超快且能在接近室温下工作的有机自旋电子学开辟了新途径。

title: Temperature and integrability-breaking correspondence via adiabatic transformations
summary: We reveal a correspondence between temperature and integrability-breaking in classical and quantum many-body systems through the lens of geometry and adiabatic transformations. Decreasing the temperature, obtained in a standard way through the derivative of entropy with respect to energy, steers the system towards an integrable point despite strong integrability-breaking interactions. Auto-correlation functions of local observables exhibit slow relaxation dynamics, which violates ergodicity on the approach to this integrable point. Subsequently, the average fidelity susceptibility of stationary states satisfies scaling relations near the integrable point, in close analogy with continuous phase transitions. We further find that the dynamical exponent encompassing relaxation can be different in the quantum and classical models, depending on dimension of the systems. Collectively, our results establish temperature as a tunable control parameter for chaos and puts it on equal footing with integrability-breaking perturbations.

AI.tldr: 温度与可积性破坏之间的对应关系：降低温度使系统趋向可积点，导致慢弛豫动力学和遍历性破坏，类似连续相变
AI.motivation: 探索温度在经典和量子多体系统中作为可调控制参数的作用，建立温度与可积性破坏之间的对应关系，将温度置于与可积性破坏微扰同等重要的地位
AI.method: 通过几何和绝热变换的视角，分析熵对能量的导数定义的标准温度，研究局域可观测量自相关函数的弛豫动力学，计算稳态的平均保真度敏感性，分析量子与经典模型中的动力学指数
AI.result: 降低温度使系统趋向可积点，即使存在强可积性破坏相互作用；自相关函数表现出慢弛豫动力学，违反遍历性；平均保真度敏感性在可积点附近满足标度关系；量子与经典模型的弛豫动力学指数可能不同，取决于系统维度
AI.conclusion: 温度可作为混沌的可调控制参数，与可积性破坏微扰同等重要，建立了温度与可积性破坏之间的对应关系，为理解多体系统中的混沌和可积性提供了新视角

title: Quantum structure of the chiral vortical effect and boundary-induced vortical pumping
summary: The chiral vortical effect (CVE) -- an axial current driven by rotation in chiral matter -- appears in systems ranging from relativistic fluids to Weyl semimetals, yet its quantum origin remains unclear because existing derivations are semiclassical. We present an exact quantum solution of a rotating Weyl fermion in a finite cylinder. We show that the bulk vortical response is entirely a magnetization current while the current density on the rotation axis remains finite and matches semiclassical predictions. For spin-polarized boundary conditions, we uncover an additional effect beyond the known CVE: a robust family of chiral modes that transport axial charge, $ΔQ=χN^2\,Δθ/4π$, under rotation by angle $Δθ$, where $χ$ is the Weyl node chirality and $N$ is the number of chiral modes. The pump is independent of temperature, Fermi level and Weyl velocities, but depends on the UV-sensitive number $N$. These results establish a fully quantum picture of the CVE and reveal a boundary-enforced chiral spectral structure underlying vortical response in Weyl systems.

AI.tldr: 该论文为手性涡旋效应(CVE)提供了精确的量子解，揭示了体响应为磁化电流，而边界条件会引发超越CVE的额外手性模式泵浦效应。
AI.motivation: 手性涡旋效应(CVE)在从相对论流体到外尔半金属等多种系统中出现，但其量子起源仍不明确，因为现有推导都是半经典的。需要建立CVE的完全量子图像。
AI.method: 提出了有限圆柱中旋转外尔费米子的精确量子解。分析了体涡旋响应和边界条件的影响，特别研究了自旋极化边界条件下的手性模式。
AI.result: 1. 体涡旋响应完全是磁化电流；2. 旋转轴上的电流密度保持有限并与半经典预测匹配；3. 自旋极化边界条件下发现了超越已知CVE的额外效应：稳健的手性模式家族，在旋转角度Δθ下传输轴向电荷ΔQ=χN²Δθ/4π。
AI.conclusion: 建立了CVE的完全量子图像，揭示了外尔系统中涡旋响应背后的边界强制手性谱结构。泵浦效应与温度、费米能级和外尔速度无关，但依赖于紫外敏感数N。

title: Experimental Design for Missing Physics
summary: For most process systems, knowledge of the model structure is incomplete. This missing physics must then be learned from experimental data. Recently, a combination of universal differential equations and symbolic regression has become a popular tool to discover these missing physics. Universal differential equations employ neural networks to represent missing parts of the model structure, and symbolic regression aims to make these neural networks interpretable. These machine learning techniques require high-quality data to successfully recover the true model structure. To gather such informative data, a sequential experimental design technique is developed which is based on optimally discriminating between the plausible model structures suggested by symbolic regression. This technique is then applied to discovering the missing physics of a bioreactor.

AI.tldr: 结合通用微分方程与符号回归发现缺失物理模型，开发基于符号回归建议模型结构的最优判别实验设计方法，应用于生物反应器
AI.motivation: 大多数过程系统的模型结构知识不完整，需要从实验数据中学习缺失的物理机制。传统方法需要高质量数据才能成功恢复真实模型结构
AI.method: 1. 使用通用微分方程（神经网络表示缺失部分）与符号回归结合发现缺失物理；2. 开发基于符号回归建议模型结构的最优判别实验设计技术，收集信息丰富的实验数据
AI.result: 开发了能够有效收集信息数据以恢复真实模型结构的实验设计技术，并成功应用于生物反应器的缺失物理发现
AI.conclusion: 结合通用微分方程、符号回归和最优实验设计的方法能够有效发现过程系统中缺失的物理模型结构，为不完全模型系统提供系统化解决方案

title: Enantiopurity-Controlled Magnetism in a Two-Dimensional Organic-Inorganic Material
summary: Extended solids that combine unpaired electron spin and structural chirality can host unconventional magnetic behaviors with potential for electronic technologies. A versatile strategy for creating chiral solids is incorporation of chiral organic molecules into inorganic crystals. However, such hybrid organic-inorganic materials have so far been examined through the lens of absolute chirality, leaving enantiomeric excess (ee) underexplored as a tuning parameter. Here, we report two-dimensional (2D) intercalation compounds with controllable ee produced by cation exchange of MnPS$_3$ with chiral organic molecules. We show that these materials' magnetism is determined by intercalant ee rather than absolute chirality. Moreover, low-ee materials display thermally activated dynamic magnetism absent from enantiopure analogs. These ee-dependent magnetic behaviors are explained by local ordering of Mn vacancies, directed by correlated vacancy-intercalant electrostatics and confined molecular packing. Together, these results demonstrate a distinctive tuning strategy for molecule-material hybrids and establish design principles for 2D chiral and magnetically dynamic materials.

AI.tldr: 二维插层化合物通过手性有机分子插层MnPS₃，其磁性由插层剂的对映体过量值而非绝对手性决定，低ee材料表现出热激活的动态磁性
AI.motivation: 结合未配对电子自旋和结构手性的扩展固体具有非常规磁性行为，但杂化有机-无机材料主要关注绝对手性，对映体过量值作为调控参数尚未充分探索
AI.method: 通过手性有机分子对MnPS₃进行阳离子交换，制备具有可控对映体过量值的二维插层化合物
AI.result: 材料的磁性由插层剂的对映体过量值而非绝对手性决定；低ee材料表现出热激活的动态磁性，这在纯对映体类似物中不存在
AI.conclusion: 这些结果展示了分子-材料杂化体系的一种独特调控策略，并为二维手性和磁性动态材料建立了设计原则

title: Gradient estimators for parameter inference in discrete stochastic kinetic models
summary: Stochastic kinetic models are ubiquitous in physics, yet inferring their parameters from experimental data remains challenging. In deterministic models, parameter inference often relies on gradients, as they can be obtained efficiently through automatic differentiation. However, these tools cannot be directly applied to stochastic simulation algorithms (SSA) such as the Gillespie algorithm, since sampling from a discrete set of reactions introduces non-differentiable operations. In this work, we adopt three gradient estimators from machine learning for the Gillespie SSA: the Gumbel-Softmax Straight-Through (GS-ST) estimator, the Score Function estimator, and the Alternative Path estimator. We compare the properties of all estimators in two representative systems exhibiting relaxation or oscillatory dynamics, where the latter requires gradient estimation of time-dependent objective functions. We find that the GS-ST estimator mostly yields well-behaved gradient estimates, but exhibits diverging variance in challenging parameter regimes, resulting in unsuccessful parameter inference. In these cases, the other estimators provide more robust, lower variance gradients. Our results demonstrate that gradient-based parameter inference can be integrated effectively with the Gillespie SSA, with different estimators offering complementary advantages.

AI.tldr: 该研究比较了三种梯度估计器（GS-ST、Score Function、Alternative Path）在Gillespie随机模拟算法参数推断中的应用，发现不同估计器各有优势，梯度方法可与随机模拟有效结合。
AI.motivation: 随机动力学模型在物理学中普遍存在，但从实验数据推断其参数仍然具有挑战性。确定性模型可以通过自动微分高效获取梯度，但这些工具不能直接应用于Gillespie等随机模拟算法，因为从离散反应集合中采样引入了不可微操作。
AI.method: 采用机器学习中的三种梯度估计器：Gumbel-Softmax Straight-Through (GS-ST)估计器、Score Function估计器和Alternative Path估计器，在具有弛豫或振荡动力学的两个代表性系统中比较这些估计器的特性。
AI.result: GS-ST估计器通常产生行为良好的梯度估计，但在具有挑战性的参数区域会表现出发散方差，导致参数推断失败。在这些情况下，其他估计器提供更稳健、方差更低的梯度。振荡动力学需要时间相关目标函数的梯度估计。
AI.conclusion: 基于梯度的参数推断可以有效地与Gillespie随机模拟算法集成，不同估计器提供互补优势，为随机动力学模型的参数推断提供了实用解决方案。

title: A New Paradigm for Computational Chemistry
summary: Computational chemistry has become an indispensable tool for generating data and insights, pervading all branches of experimental chemistry. Its most central concept is the potential energy hypersurface, key to all chemistry and materials science, as it assigns an energy to a molecular structure, the necessary ingredient for reaction mechanism elucidation and reaction rate calculation. Density functional theory (DFT) has been the most important method in practice for obtaining such energies, which is mirrored in the use of high-performance computing hardware. In the last two decades, a new class of surrogate potential energy functions has been evolving with remarkable properties: quantum accuracy combined with force-field speed. Until very recently, their application was hampered by the fact that they needed to be trained on truly large system-specific data sets, generated before a computational chemistry study could be started (in sharp contrast to DFT, which, as a first-principles method, works out of the box, but at a far higher price of computational cost). Very recently, this roadblock has been overcome by so-called foundation machine learning interatomic potentials, which are poised to completely change the way we do computational chemistry, likely prompting us to abandon DFT as the prime method of choice for this purpose in less than a decade.

AI.tldr: 机器学习原子间势能函数（基础MLIPs）将取代DFT成为计算化学的主要方法，实现量子精度与力场速度的结合
AI.motivation: 传统DFT计算成本高昂，而机器学习势能函数需要大量特定系统数据进行训练，限制了其应用。需要开发无需大量预训练、即插即用的高精度快速势能函数
AI.method: 提出基础机器学习原子间势能函数（foundation MLIPs），通过大规模预训练构建通用势能模型，无需系统特定数据即可实现量子精度计算
AI.result: 基础MLIPs克服了传统机器学习势能函数需要大量特定系统数据训练的瓶颈，实现了量子精度与力场速度的结合，有望在十年内取代DFT
AI.conclusion: 基础机器学习原子间势能函数将彻底改变计算化学研究范式，DFT作为主要方法的地位将在十年内被取代

title: Electronic-Structure Correlations Governing Superconductivity in Nb-Based High-Entropy Alloys
summary: Superconducting high-entropy alloys have recently emerged as a new platform for exploring superconductivity in highly disordered metallic systems and may offer advantages for applications requiring mechanical robustness and tolerance to extreme environments. Yet the mechanisms that govern their superconductivity, particularly the roles of lattice distortion and complex local order, both inherent to high-entropy alloys, remain unclear. The conventional valence-electron-concentration rule fails to reliably predict superconducting behavior, motivating a correlation analysis that links performance to electronic structure and lattice disorder. Here, we study a systematic series of niobium-based body-centered-cubic high-entropy alloys, from binary to quinary compositions, designed to investigate the electronic and structural effects and identify the dominant factors controlling superconductivity. Our experimental results reveal that the superconducting critical properties evolve non-monotonically with alloy complexity. Interestingly, alloys with greater lattice distortion can still achieve higher critical temperature and upper critical field. These observations are corroborated by first-principles and Eliashberg analyses, which identify the position of the niobium d-band relative to the Fermi level as the primary driver of electron-phonon coupling, critical temperature, and upper critical field, with lattice distortion serving as a secondary modifier that generally weakens coupling. We consolidate these findings into a detailed correlation map linking superconducting properties to electronic-structure fingerprints and vibrational signatures, establishing a mechanism-informed design strategy for superconducting high-entropy alloys with enhanced critical temperature and field.

AI.tldr: 该研究揭示了铌基高熵合金超导性能的主要驱动力是铌d带相对于费米能级的位置，而非晶格畸变，并建立了电子结构指纹与超导性能的关联图。
AI.motivation: 高熵合金作为高度无序金属系统中的超导新平台，其超导机制尚不明确，特别是晶格畸变和复杂局域有序性的作用。传统的价电子浓度规则无法可靠预测超导行为，需要建立性能与电子结构和晶格无序的关联分析。
AI.method: 研究了一系列从二元到五元的铌基体心立方高熵合金，通过实验测量超导临界性能，并结合第一性原理计算和Eliashberg分析，探究电子和结构效应。
AI.result: 超导临界性能随合金复杂度呈非单调演化。有趣的是，晶格畸变更大的合金仍能获得更高的临界温度和上临界场。计算分析表明，铌d带相对于费米能级的位置是电子-声子耦合、临界温度和上临界场的主要驱动力，晶格畸变作为次要调节因子通常减弱耦合。
AI.conclusion: 研究建立了超导性能与电子结构指纹和振动特征的详细关联图，为设计具有增强临界温度和临界场的超导高熵合金提供了基于机制的设计策略。

title: Revealing Strain and Disorder in Transition-Metal Dichalcogenides Using Hyperspectral Photoluminescence Imaging
summary: Hyperspectral photoluminescence (HSPL) imaging provides spatially resolved spectral information for monolayer transition-metal dichalcogenides (TMDs), enabling the detection of subtle variations in excitonic features that are not accessible with conventional optical or photoluminescence intensity imaging. We employ HSPL to map the microscopic spatial distribution of strain and disorder in hBN-encapsulated MoSe$_2$ and WSe$_2$ samples. Quantitative extraction of exciton, trion, and biexciton energies and linewidths reveals strain gradients and localized deformations, such as wrinkles and ripples. The technique allows for characterization of regions with uniform optical properties and identification of areas affected by micro-scale disorder, which may be missed by optical microscopy. Measurements on samples with different device architectures and fabrication processes demonstrate the general utility of hyperspectral PL imaging for assessing spatial heterogeneity and optoelectronic quality in two-dimensional materials.

AI.tldr: 该论文利用高光谱光致发光成像技术，实现了对单层过渡金属二硫化物中应变和微观无序的空间分布映射，能够定量提取激子、三子、双激子能量和线宽，揭示传统光学方法难以检测的细微变化。
AI.motivation: 传统光学或光致发光强度成像难以检测单层过渡金属二硫化物中激子特征的细微变化，需要一种能够提供空间分辨光谱信息的技术来揭示应变和微观无序的分布。
AI.method: 采用高光谱光致发光成像技术，对hBN封装的MoSe₂和WSe₂样品进行空间分辨光谱测量，定量提取激子、三子、双激子能量和线宽，分析应变梯度和局部变形。
AI.result: 成功映射了应变和微观无序的空间分布，识别了褶皱和波纹等局部变形，能够表征均匀光学性质区域并识别受微尺度无序影响的区域，在不同器件结构和制备工艺的样品中验证了该技术的通用性。
AI.conclusion: 高光谱光致发光成像技术是评估二维材料空间异质性和光电质量的有效工具，能够检测传统光学显微镜可能遗漏的微观无序，为二维材料表征提供了新方法。

title: Stable and Efficient Algorithms for the Fermion Determinant
comment: 17 pages, 2 tables; handbook not intended to be published in a journal, algorithms mostly based on arXiv:2312.14914 and arXiv:2604.00815
summary: Some algorithms for the numerically exact treatment of fermion determinants are summarised. This is not supposed to be a review, rather a concise handbook. The audience is expected to have a basic understanding of how to put fermions on a computer. We primarily discuss different ways to work with the fermion matrix in the "sausage" (Green's function) formulation for quantum Monte Carlo (QMC). We emphasise the need for varied approaches in different space-time volume regimes. In particular, for small spatial volumes we describe a numerically stable method based on dense matrix operations. It is designed specifically to deal with very low temperature regimes. On the other hand, for (relatively) large volumes we describe a highly efficient and scalable sparse matrix approach.

AI.tldr: 总结了几种精确处理费米子行列式的数值算法，重点讨论在量子蒙特卡洛中处理费米子矩阵的不同方法，针对不同时空体积区域提供不同方案。
AI.motivation: 为需要精确处理费米子行列式的研究人员提供实用的算法手册，针对不同计算场景（小空间体积/大空间体积）提供专门的数值稳定且高效的方法。
AI.method: 主要讨论量子蒙特卡洛中"香肠"（格林函数）公式下的费米子矩阵处理方法：1）小空间体积下使用基于稠密矩阵运算的数值稳定方法，专门处理极低温区域；2）大体积下使用高效可扩展的稀疏矩阵方法。
AI.result: 提供了针对不同时空体积区域的专门化算法：小体积时的稠密矩阵方法具有数值稳定性，大体积时的稀疏矩阵方法具有高效性和可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: 处理费米子行列式需要根据不同的时空体积区域采用不同的数值方法，没有单一通用方案，针对特定计算场景的专门化方法才能获得最佳性能。

title: VIANA: character Value-enhanced Intensity Assessment via domain-informed Neural Architecture
summary: Predicting the perceived intensity of odorants remains a fundamental challenge in sensory science due to the complex, non-linear behavior of their response, as well as the difficulty in correlating molecular structure with human perception. While traditional deep learning models, such as Graph Convolutional Networks (GCNs), excel at capturing molecular topology, they often fail to account for the biological and perceptual context of olfaction. This study introduces VIANA, a novel "tri-pillar" framework that integrates structural graph theory, character value embeddings, and phenomenological behavior. This methodology systematically evaluates knowledge transfer across three distinct domains: molecular structure via GCNs, semantic odor character values via Principal Odor Map (POM) embeddings, and biological dose-response logic via Hill's law. We demonstrate that knowledge transfer is not inherently positive; rather, a balance must be maintained in the volume of information provided to the model. While raw semantic data led to "information overload" in domain-informed models, applying Principal Component Analysis (PCA) to distill the 95% most impactful semantic variance yielded a superior "signal distillation" effect. Results indicate that the synthesis of these three knowledge transfer pillars significantly outperforms baseline structural models, with VIANA achieving a peak R^2 of 0.996 and a test Mean Squared Error (MSE) of 0.19. In this context, VIANA successfully captures the physical ceiling of saturation, the sensitivity of detection thresholds, and the nuance of odor character value expression, providing a domain grounded simulation of the human olfactory experience. This research provides a robust framework for digital olfaction, effectively bridging the gap between molecular informatics and sensory perception.

AI.tldr: VIANA：一种结合分子结构、气味语义特征和剂量响应逻辑的"三支柱"框架，显著提升气味强度预测性能
AI.motivation: 传统深度学习模型（如图卷积网络）虽擅长捕捉分子拓扑结构，但难以考虑嗅觉的生物和感知背景，无法有效关联分子结构与人类感知
AI.method: 提出VIANA三支柱框架：1）通过GCN处理分子结构；2）通过主气味图嵌入处理语义气味特征值；3）通过希尔定律处理生物剂量响应逻辑。使用PCA提取95%最重要语义方差以避免信息过载
AI.result: VIANA达到峰值R²=0.996，测试均方误差=0.19，显著优于基线结构模型。成功捕捉物理饱和上限、检测阈值敏感性以及气味特征值表达的细微差别
AI.conclusion: VIANA为数字嗅觉提供了稳健框架，有效弥合分子信息学与感官感知之间的差距，实现了对人类嗅觉体验的领域基础模拟

title: Chiral Superconductivity in Periodically Driven Altermagnet/Superconductor Heterostructures
summary: The interplay between magnetism and superconductivity provides a fertile ground for engineering exotic topological phases, while dynamical control via periodic driving offers a unique avenue to access quantum states that are inaccessible in static equilibrium. Here, we propose a strategy to achieve the Floquet chiral topological superconductivity in an altermagnet-superconductor heterostructure driven by elliptically polarized light. We show that for $s$-wave pairing, the system undergoes a transition from a trivial to a chiral topological superconducting phase. More strikingly, with the introduction of mixed $s+d$-wave pairing, we find that the system can access Floquet chiral topological superconducting phases with highly tunable Chern numbers up to N=4. These exotic phases are attributed to the intertwining of altermagnetism, superconducting pairing, and the periodic driving field. Our work establishes the light-driven altermagnetic heterostructure as a versatile platform for exploring and manipulating high-Chern-number chiral topological superconductivity.

AI.tldr: 在椭圆偏振光驱动的反铁磁-超导异质结构中实现具有可调高陈数的Floquet手性拓扑超导相
AI.motivation: 磁性与超导性的相互作用为工程化奇异拓扑相提供了丰富平台，而周期性驱动的动力学控制为访问静态平衡中无法达到的量子态提供了独特途径
AI.method: 提出在椭圆偏振光驱动的反铁磁-超导异质结构中实现Floquet手性拓扑超导性的策略，研究s波配对和混合s+d波配对情况
AI.result: 对于s波配对，系统从平凡相转变为手性拓扑超导相；对于混合s+d波配对，系统可实现陈数高达N=4的高度可调Floquet手性拓扑超导相
AI.conclusion: 光驱动的反铁磁异质结构为探索和操控高陈数手性拓扑超导性提供了一个多功能平台

title: Time-evolving matrix product operators for off-diagonal system-bath coupling
summary: Based on the process tensor framework, we extend the time-evolving matrix product operator (TEMPO) method to solve bosonic quantum impurity problems (QIPs) with off-diagonal system-bath coupling. Our method is a most generic extension of TEMPO, which applies for any QIPs as long as the bath is noninteracting and the system is linearly coupled to the bath. It naturally contains all the current developments of TEMPO in more restricted settings. As an application, we study the real-time dynamics of a spin that is coupled to a sub-ohmic bath via the Jaynes-Cummings-type system-bath coupling, and compare it against that of the standard spin-boson model. Our results show that the commonly used secular approximation could easily fail in presence of a structural bath. Our method provides a unified framework to understand different variants of TEMPO and directly suggests a fermionic generalization which has not been explored so far, it could also be straightforwardly used as an impurity solver in the bosonic dynamical mean field theory.

AI.tldr: 将TEMPO方法扩展到具有非对角系统-浴耦合的玻色量子杂质问题，提供了一个统一框架来理解TEMPO的不同变体，并可直接推广到费米子系统。
AI.motivation: 现有的TEMPO方法在处理具有非对角系统-浴耦合的玻色量子杂质问题时存在限制，需要更通用的扩展来覆盖更广泛的应用场景。
AI.method: 基于过程张量框架，扩展时间演化矩阵乘积算子(TEMPO)方法，使其适用于任何非相互作用浴且系统与浴线性耦合的量子杂质问题。
AI.result: 研究了Jaynes-Cummings型系统-浴耦合下自旋与亚欧姆浴的实时动力学，发现常用的旋波近似在结构浴存在时容易失效。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为理解TEMPO的不同变体提供了统一框架，可直接推广到费米子系统，并可作为玻色动力学平均场理论中的杂质求解器。

title: Bond-density-wave orders induced by geometric frustration in the kagome metal CeRu3Si2
summary: Geometric frustration gives rise to vast manifolds of degenerate ground states and competing orders in spin and charge systems. Typically, classical ground states are governed by a local ``zero-sum constraint" that relieves frustrated antiferromagnetic interactions or Coulomb repulsion. To date, the paradigm of geometric frustration has yielded a rich landscape of emergent phases, from spin ices and quantum spin liquids to charge glasses. However, an analogous phase rooted in chemical bonding has yet to be firmly demonstrated. Here we report the discovery of bond-density-wave orders induced by geometric frustration in the kagome metal CeRu$_3$Si$_2$ above room temperature. Through synchrotron X-ray diffraction, real-space transmission electron microscopy, and model calculations, we observe two distinct long-period superlattices with harmonic and anharmonic structural modulations. Crucially, interlayer bonds between kagome planes modulate in a sublattice-selective manner to fulfill the zero-sum constraint on the kagome lattice. We demonstrate the potential of kagome metals to host complex bond-ordered states constrained by geometric frustration and establish chemical bonding as a distinct pathway to frustration physics in quantum materials even above room temperature.

AI.tldr: 在Kagome金属CeRu₃Si₂中发现由几何阻挫诱导的键密度波有序态，温度可达室温以上
AI.motivation: 几何阻挫在自旋和电荷系统中产生了丰富的基态简并和竞争有序相，但基于化学键的类似相尚未被证实。本研究旨在探索Kagome金属中由几何阻挫约束的化学键有序态。
AI.method: 使用同步辐射X射线衍射、实空间透射电子显微镜和模型计算，研究CeRu₃Si₂中的结构调制和键有序
AI.result: 观察到两种不同的长周期超晶格结构，具有谐波和非谐波结构调制。Kagome平面间的层间键以子晶格选择性的方式调制，以满足Kagome晶格上的"零和约束"
AI.conclusion: 证明了Kagome金属具有承载由几何阻挫约束的复杂键有序态的潜力，确立了化学键作为量子材料中阻挫物理的独特途径，即使在室温以上也能存在

title: The topological gap at criticality: scaling exponent d + η, universality, and scope
summary: The topological gap $Δ= TP_{H_1}^{real} - TP_{H_1}^{shuf}$ -- the excess $H_1$ total persistence of the majority-spin alpha complex over a density-matched null -- encodes critical correlations in spin models. We establish finite-size scaling: $Δ(L,T) = A L^{d+η} G_-(L|t/T_c|)$, with $G_-(x) \sim (1+x/x_0)^{-(1+β/ν)}$. For 2D Ising, $α= 2.249 \pm 0.038$, matching $d+η= 9/4$ to $0.03σ$; the $G_-$ exponent $γ= 1.089 \pm 0.077$ is consistent with $1+β/ν= 9/8$ ($ΔR^2 < 10^{-5}$). For 2D Potts $q=3$ with $L$ up to 1024, $α= 2.272 \pm 0.024$ ($0.2σ$ from $d+η= 2.267$), with two-term corrections to scaling ($R^2 = 0.9999$). The $G_-$ exponent $γ= 1.114$ (68% CI $[1.053, 1.173]$) matches $1+β/ν= 17/15$. Scope boundaries: the law fails for 2D Potts $q=4$ ($α= 2.347 \pm 0.017$, $9.3σ$ from $d+η= 5/2$) where logarithmic corrections prevent convergence, and for raw 3D Ising ($4σ$ from $d+η$), but density normalization $Δ/|M|^{1/2}$ recovers $α= 3.06 \pm 0.04$ ($0.6σ$). The framework fails for first-order, BKT, and percolation. The criterion: $α= d+η$ holds when corrections to scaling are algebraic ($ω> 0$) but fails when logarithmic ($ω\to 0$).

AI.tldr: 拓扑间隙Δ作为自旋模型中的关键相关量，在有限尺寸标度下呈现幂律行为，适用于具有代数修正的临界系统，但对数修正系统失效。
AI.motivation: 研究拓扑持久同调在自旋模型临界现象中的应用，探索拓扑间隙Δ作为临界相关量的普适性及其与临界指数的关系。
AI.method: 通过计算多数自旋α复形的H1总持久度与密度匹配零模型的差值定义拓扑间隙Δ，分析其在有限尺寸标度下的行为，建立Δ(L,T) = A L^{d+η} G_-(L|t/T_c|)的标度关系。
AI.result: 对于2D Ising模型，α=2.249±0.038与d+η=9/4一致；2D Potts q=3模型α=2.272±0.024接近理论值2.267。但对于2D Potts q=4模型(α=2.347±0.017)和对数修正系统，该关系失效。密度归一化Δ/|M|^{1/2}可恢复3D Ising模型的正确标度行为。
AI.conclusion: 拓扑间隙Δ的标度律α=d+η适用于具有代数修正(ω>0)的临界系统，但对于具有对数修正(ω→0)的系统、一级相变、BKT相变和渗流问题失效。

title: Magboltz-GUI: a Python-based graphical user interface for Magboltz
summary: Magboltz is widely used to compute electron transport properties in gas mixtures for detector applications. Its text-based workflow, however, can be a barrier for routine use, especially for users who are not already familiar with the program. We present Magboltz-GUI, a Python-based graphical user interface for defining gas mixtures, configuring simulation parameters, running Magboltz, and visualizing or exporting the resulting. The tool is designed as a lightweight frontend for common tasks in research and teaching environments involving gaseous detectors, including micropattern technologies such as Micromegas. This paper describes the software implementation, main interface components, and its availability as an open-source distributed package via Python tools.

AI.tldr: 开发了Magboltz-GUI，一个基于Python的图形用户界面，用于简化Magboltz气体传输特性计算工具的使用流程。
AI.motivation: Magboltz广泛用于计算探测器应用中的气体混合物电子传输特性，但其基于文本的工作流程对常规使用构成障碍，特别是对于不熟悉该程序的用户。
AI.method: 开发了一个基于Python的图形用户界面，作为Magboltz的轻量级前端，支持定义气体混合物、配置模拟参数、运行Magboltz以及可视化或导出结果。
AI.result: 创建了Magboltz-GUI工具，专门为涉及气体探测器（包括微模式技术如Micromegas）的研究和教学环境中的常见任务设计。
AI.conclusion: 该软件作为开源分布式包通过Python工具提供，简化了Magboltz的使用流程，降低了用户门槛。

title: TUNA: A streamlined quantum chemistry program for atoms and diatomics
summary: We present TUNA, an open-source quantum chemistry program specifically designed for atoms and diatomic molecules. Within this narrow molecular domain, a broad and consistent set of electronic structure methods and calculation types is available. Energies, optimisations, vibrational frequencies, response properties, coordinate scans and ab initio molecular dynamics trajectories can be accessed through an intuitive command-line interface. A single principle underlies TUNA: once a method can be used to evaluate the energy, all properties follow from numerical differentiation. This makes the program both a transparent teaching platform and a compact environment for benchmarking methods on diatomics $\unicode{x2014}$ among the most simple yet instructive systems in quantum chemistry. Reference implementations including density functional theory, many-body perturbation theory and coupled cluster theory, supported by detailed theoretical documentation, make TUNA an accessible foundation for developing improved methods and algorithms in electronic structure.

AI.tldr: TUNA是一个专门用于原子和双原子分子的开源量子化学程序，通过数值微分提供多种计算功能，既是教学平台也是基准测试环境。
AI.motivation: 为原子和双原子分子这一简单但重要的量子化学系统提供一个透明、一致的计算平台，既可用于教学，也可用于方法基准测试和新算法开发。
AI.method: 基于数值微分原理：一旦方法能计算能量，所有性质都通过数值微分获得。提供密度泛函理论、多体微扰理论和耦合簇理论等参考实现，支持能量计算、优化、振动频率、响应性质、坐标扫描和从头算分子动力学等多种计算类型。
AI.result: 开发了一个开源量子化学程序TUNA，专门针对原子和双原子分子，提供直观的命令行界面和详细的理论文档，使程序既适合教学也适合方法开发。
AI.conclusion: TUNA为原子和双原子分子提供了一个透明、紧凑的计算环境，既是量子化学教学的理想平台，也是开发改进电子结构方法和算法的基础。

title: Insulator-to-Metal Transitions Driven by Quantized Formal Polarization Mismatch
summary: We propose a mechanism for insulator-to-metal (IM) transitions driven by the mismatch of quantized formal polarization (QFP), a symmetry-protected bulk invariant. For a material with a low-symmetry insulating phase and a high-symmetry phase that allow distinct QFPs, any continuous path connecting them while preserving the symmetry of the low-symmetry phase must inevitably pass through an IM transition. The reason is that QFP remains invariant along any gapped symmetry-preserving evolution, whereas the high-symmetry phase requires a different QFP, which can only be accommodated by gap closing. First-principles calculations on two representative systems, two-dimensional InPS$_3$ and three-dimensional CdBiO$_3$, confirm this mechanism. Our results establish QFP mismatch as a general symmetry constraint on phase evolution and reveal a new route to symmetry-driven IM transitions in high-symmetry materials.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种由量子化形式极化不匹配驱动的绝缘体-金属相变机制，该机制受对称性保护的体态不变量约束。
AI.motivation: 探索对称性驱动的绝缘体-金属相变新机制，理解高对称性材料中相变路径的对称性约束。
AI.method: 基于量子化形式极化这一对称性保护的体态不变量，分析低对称性绝缘相与高对称性相之间的连续演化路径。通过第一性原理计算在二维InPS₃和三维CdBiO₃系统中验证该机制。
AI.result: 当低对称性绝缘相与高对称性相具有不同的量子化形式极化时，任何保持低对称性相对称性的连续演化路径都必须经历绝缘体-金属相变。第一性原理计算证实了该机制在代表性系统中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 量子化形式极化不匹配为相演化提供了一般性的对称性约束，揭示了高对称性材料中对称性驱动绝缘体-金属相变的新途径。

title: Dissecting superconductivity in the Ruddlesden-Popper nickelates: The role of electron correlation and interlayer magnetic exchange
summary: The discovery of superconductivity in the Ruddlesden-Popper (RP) nickelates has opened a new chapter in the search for high superconducting transition temperatures ($T_\mathrm{c}$) materials. A central and puzzling feature of this family is the wide variation in $T_\mathrm{c}$ despite their common NiO$_2$ building blocks, as highlighted by the recent observation of superconductivity at $\sim$ 30 K in trilayer $\mathrm{La_4Ni_3O_{10}}$, significantly lower than 80 K reported in bilayer $\mathrm{La_3Ni_2O_7}$. Understanding the factors that control $T_\mathrm{c}$ in this family is therefore of paramount importance. Here, we use resonant inelastic x-ray scattering (RIXS) to investigate the electronic and magnetic excitations of $\mathrm{La_4Ni_3O_{10}}$ in direct comparison with its bilayer counterpart. Our results reveal a markedly different landscape. $\mathrm{La_4Ni_3O_{10}}$ exhibits a more itinerant character, evidenced by broader Ni $dd$ orbital excitations and a strong Ni 3$d$ fluorescence continuum, suggesting weaker electronic correlations than in the bilayer. Despite this, well-defined collective spin excitations persist, including dispersive acoustic and optical magnon branches alongside an incommensurate spin density wave. Using linear spin wave theory, we extract the interlayer superexchange interaction ($J_z$) to be $\sim$ 22 meV, much smaller than that in $\mathrm{La_3Ni_2O_7}$. The weaker correlation and reduced interlayer exchange together provide a consistent explanation for the substantially lower $T_\mathrm{c}$ in the trilayer compound. Our findings establish interlayer magnetic coupling and electronic correlation as key parameters governing superconductivity in layered nickelates and offer critical constraints for understanding the pairing mechanism in this emerging family.

AI.tldr: 三层镍酸盐La₄Ni₃O₁₀的超导转变温度（~30 K）远低于双层La₃Ni₂O₇（80 K），研究通过RIXS揭示其更弱的电子关联和层间交换作用是关键原因。
AI.motivation: Ruddlesden-Popper镍酸盐家族中，尽管具有相同的NiO₂结构单元，但不同层数的超导转变温度差异巨大（双层80K vs 三层30K），理解控制Tc的因素至关重要。
AI.method: 使用共振非弹性X射线散射（RIXS）技术，直接比较La₄Ni₃O₁₀（三层）和La₃Ni₂O₇（双层）的电子和磁激发，通过线性自旋波理论提取层间超交换相互作用。
AI.result: 三层化合物表现出更强的巡游特性（更宽的Ni dd轨道激发和强荧光连续谱），表明电子关联更弱；层间超交换相互作用J_z约为22 meV，远小于双层化合物；但仍存在明确的集体自旋激发。
AI.conclusion: 层间磁耦合和电子关联强度是控制层状镍酸盐超导转变温度的关键参数，较弱的关联和减小的层间交换共同解释了三层化合物显著较低的Tc，为理解该家族配对机制提供了重要约束。

title: Coupled dynamical Boltzmann transport equations with long-range electron-phonon and electron-electron interactions in 2D materials
summary: We study the interplay between long-range electron-phonon and electron-electron interactions in electrostatically doped two-dimensional semiconductors, including interlayer couplings in van der Waals heterostructures. We evaluate the effects of those interactions on transport properties by writing dynamically coupled Boltzmann equations for the electrons and for the electrodynamically active excitations. We develop a theory with a general validity, and apply it both to simplified parabolic models, and to the realistic BN-encapsulated graphene system which we present in an accompanying paper [arXiv:2604.00678]. We show that dynamical screening effects are of fundamental importance in order to correctly describe the electronic transport properties of two-dimensional materials, and in particular the scattering from polar phonons, whether those come from the semiconductor itself or the surrounding layers.

AI.tldr: 研究二维半导体中长程电子-声子与电子-电子相互作用的耦合效应，开发动态耦合玻尔兹曼方程理论，应用于石墨烯系统，证明动态屏蔽对正确描述二维材料输运性质至关重要
AI.motivation: 研究静电掺杂二维半导体中长程电子-声子和电子-电子相互作用的耦合效应，特别是在范德华异质结构中的层间耦合，这些相互作用对电子输运性质有重要影响
AI.method: 建立具有普适性的理论框架，通过动态耦合的玻尔兹曼方程描述电子和电动力学活性激发之间的相互作用，应用于简化抛物线模型和BN封装石墨烯系统
AI.result: 动态屏蔽效应对于正确描述二维材料的电子输运性质至关重要，特别是对于来自半导体本身或周围层的极性声子散射
AI.conclusion: 动态屏蔽效应在二维材料电子输运中起基础性作用，必须考虑电子-声子和电子-电子相互作用的耦合才能准确描述输运性质

title: Sign-Free Evidence for a d-Wave Superfluid Stiffness Dome in the Doped Hubbard Model
summary: We construct an effective single-particle Hamiltonian $K_{\mathrm{eff}}$ from Monte Carlo--averaged matrix logarithms of the imaginary-time propagator in determinant quantum Monte Carlo (DQMC). The logarithm maps the multiplicative sign problem into an additive framework where the central limit theorem guarantees convergence, rendering $K_{\mathrm{eff}}$ sign-problem-free: both sign sectors yield identical dispersions to $<1\%$. $K_{\mathrm{eff}}$ captures the exact correlated single-particle spectrum, incorporating all self-energy effects non-perturbatively. Applied to the Hubbard model ($t'/t = -0.30$, $U/t = 4$), $K_{\mathrm{eff}}$ reveals a $d$-wave pseudogap with strong nodal-antinodal dichotomy below a computational phase transition at $T^*$. Three sign-free observables provide evidence consistent with spin-fluctuation pairing: (i) the gap ratio $R_g > 1$ confirms $d$-wave symmetry -- a temperature-independent property of the correlated band structure that provides the medium for pairing; (ii) the superfluid stiffness $ρ_s$ forms a dome across doping at $L = 8$, $10$, and $12$, exceeding the Berezinskii-Kosterlitz-Thouless threshold by $5$-$7\times$ at the dome peak; (iii) $S(π,π)$ is approximately flat across doping, establishing that the dome originates from Fermi-surface geometry responding to uniform spin-fluctuation glue. The pseudogap grows monotonically toward half-filling while $ρ_s$ forms a dome, mirroring cuprate phenomenology where $T_c$ is limited by the superfluid density (Uemura relation). Vertex corrections remain to be quantified.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过构建有效单粒子哈密顿量K_eff，将行列式量子蒙特卡罗中的符号问题转化为可收敛的加性框架，并应用于哈伯德模型，揭示了d波赝隙和自旋涨落配对的证据。
AI.motivation: 解决行列式量子蒙特卡罗(DQMC)中的符号问题，并开发一种能够精确捕捉关联单粒子谱的方法，以研究强关联系统中的电子行为。
AI.method: 从DQMC的虚时传播子矩阵对数中构建有效单粒子哈密顿量K_eff，将乘法符号问题转化为加性框架，利用中心极限定理保证收敛。应用于哈伯德模型(t'/t = -0.30, U/t = 4)。
AI.result: K_eff成功消除了符号问题，揭示了d波赝隙和强节点-反节点二分性。三个无符号可观测量支持自旋涨落配对：1) 间隙比R_g>1确认d波对称性；2) 超流刚度ρ_s在掺杂范围内形成圆顶结构；3) S(π,π)在掺杂范围内近似平坦，表明圆顶源于费米面几何对均匀自旋涨落胶水的响应。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了DQMC中的符号问题，为研究强关联系统提供了新工具。在哈伯德模型中观察到的赝隙和超流刚度行为与铜氧化物超导体的实验现象一致，支持自旋涨落配对机制，但顶点修正仍需进一步量化。

title: Anomalous scaling in redirection networks
summary: In networks that grow by isotropic redirection (IR), a new node selects an initial target node uniformly at random and attaches to a randomly chosen neighbor of the target. The emerging networks exhibit leaf proliferation, in which the number of nonleaves scales sublinearly as $N^μ$ and the degree distribution has an algebraic tail with exponent $1+μ$. To understand these mysterious properties, we introduce a class of models with redirection to leaves whenever possible. The resulting networks exhibit qualitatively similar phenomenology to IR networks, but avoid the inherent non-locality of the IR growth rule. These networks admit an analytical description of the leaf degree distribution, from which we extract the exponent $μ$.

AI.tldr: 研究各向同性重定向网络中的叶节点增殖现象，提出新的重定向到叶节点的模型，解析求解叶节点度分布并提取关键指数μ
AI.motivation: 各向同性重定向网络中观察到的叶节点增殖现象（非叶节点数量以N^μ次线性增长，度分布具有代数尾1+μ）缺乏理论解释，需要理解这些神秘特性
AI.method: 引入一类新模型，尽可能重定向到叶节点，避免原始IR增长规则的非局部性，通过解析方法描述叶节点度分布
AI.result: 新模型表现出与IR网络相似的现象学特征，但避免了非局部性，获得了叶节点度分布的解析描述，从中提取了关键指数μ
AI.conclusion: 通过重定向到叶节点的模型，成功解释了各向同性重定向网络中的叶节点增殖现象，提供了度分布代数尾指数的解析理解

title: A new framework for atom-resolved decomposition of second-harmonic generation in nonlinear-optical crystals
summary: In this work, we develop a new framework for computing atom-resolved contributions to optical properties based on atoms-in-molecules (AIM) schemes. The formalism is independent of the specific AIM method and is made rigorous by partitioning momentum matrix elements into atomic contributions while exactly satisfying the relevant sum rules. We apply it to second-harmonic generation (SHG) in six representative UV and deep-UV nonlinear-optical crystals, namely $β$-\ce{BaB2O4} (BBO), \ce{LiB3O5} (LBO), \ce{CsB3O5} (CBO), \ce{CsLiB6O10} (CLBO), \ce{KBe2BO3F2} (KBBF), and \ce{LiCs2PO4} (LCPO). The atom-triplet decomposition reveals a clear hierarchy for the largest SHG component of each crystal. In general, two-center terms provide the leading contribution, one-center terms remain comparatively small, and fully three-center terms supply an important secondary contribution. A motif-triplet decomposition further indicates behavior dominated by the anionic framework in KBBF and LBO. In BBO, CBO, and CLBO, contributions from the anionic framework and the cation sublattice act cooperatively, although the cation contribution is crystal dependent. Moreover, cooperative contributions from the phosphate framework and the Cs sublattice are also observed in LCPO, where the O-Cs contribution is particularly significant. These results may provide a new perspective for understanding the microscopic origin of SHG in nonlinear-optical materials.

AI.tldr: 提出基于原子在分子方案计算光学性质原子分辨贡献的新框架，应用于六种非线性光学晶体的二次谐波产生分析，揭示原子三重组分解的贡献层次结构。
AI.motivation: 开发一个独立于特定原子在分子方法的框架，用于计算光学性质的原子分辨贡献，以理解非线性光学材料中二次谐波产生的微观起源。
AI.method: 通过将动量矩阵元划分为原子贡献，建立满足相关求和规则的严格形式体系，应用于六种代表性紫外和深紫外非线性光学晶体的二次谐波产生分析。
AI.result: 原子三重组分解显示：双中心项为主要贡献，单中心项相对较小，完全三中心项提供重要次要贡献。不同晶体中阴离子框架和阳离子亚晶格的贡献模式各异。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为理解非线性光学材料中二次谐波产生的微观起源提供了新视角，揭示了不同晶体中原子贡献的层次结构和协同作用模式。

title: Precipitate-Induced Dynamic Strain Aging and Its Effect on the Strain Rate Sensitivity of Precipitation Hardened Aluminum Alloys
summary: We examine precipitate-induced dynamic strain aging in precipitation-hardened Al-Cu alloys by combining atomistic simulations, kinetic Monte Carlo, and analytical rate theory. Atomistic simulations were used to characterize (1) the energetics of nearest neighbour Cu<->Al exchanges at dislocation - precipitate junctions and (2) the subsequent change in obstacle strength. For robustness, the simulations were performed with two distinct interatomic potentials. The resulting catalog of local Cu-Al exchange events was used as input for a kinetic Monte Carlo model of the time-dependent evolution of obstacle strength during dislocation pinning at the precipitate. The predicted strengthening kinetics were then embedded in an analytical dynamic strain aging model to predict the strain-rate sensitivity parameter. On the whole, the modeling predicts a low strain-rate sensitivity across a broad range of intermediate quasi-static strain rates, consistent with experimental observations for precipitate-strengthened alloys. The results therefore identify a mechanistic origin of the low strain-rate sensitivity in precipitation hardened aluminum alloys, emerging directly from the kinetics of dislocation-precipitate interactions when nearest neighbour Cu<->Al exchanges are considered.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过多尺度模拟方法揭示了Al-Cu合金中析出相诱导的动态应变时效机制，解释了析出强化铝合金低应变率敏感性的微观起源。
AI.motivation: 研究旨在理解析出强化铝合金中观察到的低应变率敏感性现象，特别是探究析出相与位错相互作用如何导致动态应变时效，从而影响材料的应变率敏感性。
AI.method: 采用多尺度模拟方法：1）原子模拟表征位错-析出相界面处Cu↔Al最近邻交换的能量学和障碍强度变化；2）动力学蒙特卡洛模拟位错钉扎过程中障碍强度的时间演化；3）将预测的强化动力学嵌入分析性动态应变时效模型来预测应变率敏感性参数。
AI.result: 模型预测在广泛的准静态应变率范围内存在低应变率敏感性，这与析出强化合金的实验观察一致。研究揭示了低应变率敏感性的机制起源：当考虑最近邻Cu↔Al交换时，位错-析出相相互作用的动力学直接导致了这一现象。
AI.conclusion: 该研究首次从微观机制上解释了析出强化铝合金低应变率敏感性的起源，即析出相诱导的动态应变时效机制，为理解这类材料的力学行为提供了重要理论依据。

title: Jahn-Teller distortion on strained La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$ thin films
summary: We present a systematic study of the electronic structure of strained La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$ thin films. We show that biaxial compressive strain mainly elongates the outer apical Ni-O bond while leaving the inner apical Ni-O bond nearly unchanged. As a result, the Jahn-Teller splitting $Δ_{JT}$ is strongly enhanced, whereas the interlayer $d_{z^2}$ hopping $t_\perp^z$ changes only weakly. Since superconductivity is widely believed to emerge only below a critical in-plane lattice constant, our results identify the strain-enhanced $Δ_{JT}$ as the relevant microscopic tuning parameter. Consistently, the calculated Fermi surfaces and Hall response for LaAlO$_3$ and SrLaAlO$_4$ substrates agree with ARPES and Hall measurements. Our results identify Jahn-Teller distortion as a key tuning parameter in strained La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$ and support its central role in optimizing superconductivity in bilayer nickelates.

AI.tldr: 双轴压缩应变主要拉长外层顶端Ni-O键，增强Jahn-Teller分裂，而层间dz²跳跃变化微弱，表明应变增强的Jahn-Teller分裂是调控超导的关键微观参数。
AI.motivation: 研究应变对La₃Ni₂O₇薄膜电子结构的影响，探索超导性出现的微观机制，特别是理解为什么超导性只在低于临界面内晶格常数时出现。
AI.method: 系统研究应变La₃Ni₂O₇薄膜的电子结构，分析双轴压缩应变对Ni-O键长、Jahn-Teller分裂和层间dz²跳跃的影响，计算不同衬底上的费米面和霍尔响应。
AI.result: 应变主要拉长外层顶端Ni-O键，显著增强Jahn-Teller分裂ΔJT，而层间dz²跳跃t⊥z变化微弱；计算的费米面和霍尔响应与ARPES和霍尔测量结果一致。
AI.conclusion: 应变增强的Jahn-Teller分裂是调控La₃Ni₂O₇超导性的关键微观参数，支持Jahn-Teller畸变在双层镍酸盐优化超导性中的核心作用。

title: Quasi-1D Planar Magnetic Topological Heterostructure
summary: We theoretically introduce a quasi-1D magnetic heterostructure of alternating 2D topological and normal insulator strips. Its low-energy physics is governed by a hybrid Hamiltonian intertwining the Su-Schrieffer-Heeger and Shockley models, with spin-momentum locking and local Zeeman splitting. Symmetry analysis places it in class AIII, characterized by chiral symmetry and a $\mathbb{Z}$ topological invariant. Computing the winding number from the block-off-diagonal structure of the Hamiltonian reveals topological phases characterized by invariants $ν= 0$, $1$, and $2$. Furthermore, a single magnetic defect acts as a sensitive local probe, whose in-gap spectrum provides a spectroscopic fingerprint to distinguish topological phases. Extending the platform to a multilayer geometry uncovers a nonsymmorphic projective symmetry that gives rise to Möbius band topology, with the Brillouin zone compactifying into a Klein bottle. Our work establishes a platform for higher-order topology via heterostructure design and magnetic patterning.

AI.tldr: 提出一种准一维磁性异质结构，由交替的二维拓扑绝缘体和普通绝缘体条带组成，具有高阶拓扑特性，可通过磁缺陷探测拓扑相。
AI.motivation: 通过异质结构设计和磁图案化构建高阶拓扑平台，探索新型拓扑相和拓扑不变量。
AI.method: 理论构建准一维磁性异质结构，结合SSH和Shockley模型，通过对称性分析（AIII类）、绕数计算和磁缺陷光谱探测拓扑相。
AI.result: 发现拓扑相具有ν=0,1,2的拓扑不变量，磁缺陷可作为局部探针区分拓扑相，多层结构展现莫比乌斯带拓扑和克莱因瓶布里渊区。
AI.conclusion: 该工作通过异质结构设计和磁图案化建立了高阶拓扑平台，为探索新型拓扑相和拓扑不变量提供了新途径。

title: Bond-Length-Driven Magnetic Transition in Quasi-One-Dimensional CrSb$X_3$ ($X$=S, Se)
summary: Using {\it ab initio} calculations, we investigate the magnetic ground states of quasi-one-dimensional insulating CrSb$X_3$ ($X$ = S, Se) with infinite double-rutile chains. Within conventional band theory, without explicit Coulomb correlations ($U$), we obtain band gaps in close agreement with experiment. Remarkably, we find that the magnetic order is highly sensitive to the Cr-Cr bond length $d_{\rm Cr-Cr}$: increasing the bond length induces a transition from antiferromagnetic to ferromagnetic order at a critical distance $d^c_{\rm Cr-Cr} \approx 3.53 (\pm 0.05)$ Å. Accordingly, CrSbS$_3$ lies near the transition boundary, whereas CrSbSe$_3$ is robustly ferromagnetic, in good agreement with experiment. Analysis of the exchange interactions reveals that the first-order phase transition is dominated by a sign reversal of the intrachain nearest-neighbor superexchange $J_1$ mediated by chalcogen ions, while the intrachain direct exchange $J_2$ remains ferromagnetic and changes only gradually. This behavior reflects an emergent Bethe-Slater-like behavior driven by competing exchange pathways in a quasi-1D transition-metal system, where the competition between $J_1$ and $J_2$ dictates the magnetic ground state. Besides, the electronic structures of the ground states of each compound are investigated.

AI.tldr: 通过第一性原理计算研究准一维绝缘体CrSbX₃的磁性基态，发现磁序对Cr-Cr键长高度敏感，键长增加会导致反铁磁到铁磁的转变，这种转变由最近邻超交换J₁的符号反转主导。
AI.motivation: 研究准一维双金红石链结构CrSbX₃的磁性基态，理解其磁序对结构参数的敏感性，特别是Cr-Cr键长变化如何影响磁性相变。
AI.method: 使用第一性原理计算，考虑电子关联效应，分析CrSbS₃和CrSbSe₃的电子结构和磁性。通过改变Cr-Cr键长参数，研究磁序转变，并计算交换相互作用J₁和J₂来分析相变机制。
AI.result: 发现磁序高度依赖于Cr-Cr键长：键长增加会导致反铁磁到铁磁的转变，临界距离约为3.53±0.05 Å。CrSbS₃接近转变边界，而CrSbSe₃是稳定的铁磁体，与实验一致。相变主要由最近邻超交换J₁的符号反转主导，而直接交换J₂保持铁磁性且变化平缓。
AI.conclusion: 准一维过渡金属系统CrSbX₃表现出类似Bethe-Slater的竞争交换机制，其中J₁和J₂的竞争决定了磁性基态。Cr-Cr键长是控制磁序的关键参数，这种敏感性源于超交换和直接交换路径的竞争。

title: The Mpemba effect likes to hit a wall
summary: The historical Mpemba effect involves a first-order phase transition. This has prompted the experimental realization of microscopic proxies in the form of a colloidal particle trapped in an asymmetric double well, for which the Mpemba effect has indeed been observed. We establish that the existence of the one-dimensional Mpemba effect for a polynomial potential is driven solely by the presence of a hard enough boundary, irrespective of the potential's double-well shape. We then show that the physics of the underlying Mpemba effect is governed not only by single-well physics but also by the high-temperature initial regime.

AI.tldr: 论文证明一维Mpemba效应的存在仅由足够硬的边界驱动，与双阱势形状无关，且该效应的物理机制不仅涉及单阱物理，还受高温初始状态影响。
AI.motivation: 传统Mpemba效应涉及一级相变，已有实验在非对称双阱势中的胶体粒子观察到该效应。本研究旨在探究一维Mpemba效应的根本驱动因素，特别是边界条件的作用。
AI.method: 研究多项式势中的一维Mpemba效应，分析硬边界条件对效应存在的影响，考察单阱物理和高温初始状态在效应机制中的作用。
AI.result: 发现一维Mpemba效应的存在仅由足够硬的边界驱动，与势能的双阱形状无关。效应的物理机制不仅取决于单阱物理，还显著受高温初始状态的影响。
AI.conclusion: Mpemba效应的根本驱动因素是硬边界条件而非双阱势形状，效应的完整理解需要同时考虑单阱物理和高温初始状态。

title: Efficient Auxiliary-Field Quantum Monte Carlo using Isometric Tensor Hypercontraction
summary: Auxiliary Field Quantum Monte Carlo (AFQMC) has emerged as a powerful framework for treating strongly correlated electronic systems, offering a favorable balance between computational cost and accuracy. In this paper, we present a novel AFQMC method that uses the isometric tensor hypercontraction (ITHC) technique to diagonalize the two-body Coulomb interaction of molecular electronic Hamiltonians by introducing additional fictitious fermionic modes. Our method shows reduced theoretical complexity and better practical performance for both propagation and local energy evaluation compared to the standard AFQMC method. We demonstrate the efficacy of this approach by computing the ground-state energies of a linear $\ce{H10}$-chain and the benzene molecule. Our results show that the extended-basis AFQMC recovers many-body correlations with a precision comparable to that of high-level wavefunction methods such as Coupled Clusters (CC) or Density Matrix Renormalization Group (DMRG), while offering significantly improved scaling.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于等距张量超压缩(ITHC)的辅助场量子蒙特卡洛(AFQMC)新方法，通过引入虚拟费米子模式对角化双体库仑相互作用，降低了理论复杂度并提升了实际性能。
AI.motivation: AFQMC在处理强关联电子系统时需要在计算成本和精度之间取得平衡。现有方法在处理双体库仑相互作用时存在复杂度高和性能限制的问题，需要开发更高效的方法。
AI.method: 使用等距张量超压缩(ITHC)技术，通过引入额外的虚拟费米子模式来对角化分子电子哈密顿量中的双体库仑相互作用，从而降低传播和局域能量评估的理论复杂度。
AI.result: 在线性H10链和苯分子体系上验证了方法的有效性，计算得到的基态能量精度与耦合簇(CC)或密度矩阵重整化群(DMRG)等高精度波函数方法相当，同时具有显著改进的标度性。
AI.conclusion: 基于ITHC的AFQMC方法在保持高精度的同时显著降低了计算复杂度，为处理强关联电子系统提供了一种高效的计算框架，在计算标度方面相比传统方法有明显优势。

title: Magnetoelectric Coupling in Nickel-Cobalt Ferrite and Lanthanum Ferrite Heterostructure Composites: Experimental Evidence and Simulation-Driven Insights
summary: A material that reveals two or more ferroelectric properties at the same time is called multiferroic materials. The most commonly multiferroic materials shows ferroelectricity and ferromagnetism property within a single phase. Accordingly such materials can possess both spontaneous magnetization and electric polarization and which can be individually controlled through external electric or magnetic fields. The unique coexistence of ferroelectric properties opens up possibilities for innovative applications, including memory devices, sensors, and actuators that are responsive to both electrical and magneticstimuli. Multiferroics gives a valuable foundation for generating cutting edge multifunctional devices, exhibiting their versatility across broad area technological fields. Applications include sensors, transducers, spintronics, terahertz emitters, miniature antennas, energy harvesting, multiple state memory storage, electric field controlled ferromagnetic resonance devices, and nanoscale electronics. Researchers are continually work to discovering new materials exploring the fundamental mechanisms involved, and optimizing their performance for various application. Multiferroic materials has a promising area for innovation and exploration the field of advance technologies this type of materials contributing not only to device development but also enhancing the understanding of the interactions between ferroelectric and magnetic orders. Additionally, magnetoelectric composites is a type of multifunctional material showing strong coupling between magnetic and electric properties for further technological applications. Magnetoelectric (ME) composites are synthesis by combining separate magnetic and electric materials to produce unique functionalities through their interactions. This coupling enables the control of magnetic properties by an electric field and vice versa.

AI.tldr: 多铁性材料同时展现铁电和铁磁特性，可实现电场控制磁性和磁场控制电极化，在存储器、传感器、自旋电子学等领域有广泛应用前景。
AI.motivation: 多铁性材料能够同时展现铁电性和铁磁性，这种独特的共存特性为开发新型多功能器件提供了可能，特别是在需要电场和磁场双重响应的应用中具有重要价值。
AI.method: 通过研究单相多铁性材料以及磁电复合材料，探索铁电和铁磁序之间的相互作用机制，优化材料性能以满足不同应用需求。
AI.result: 多铁性材料展现出电场控制磁化和磁场控制电极化的能力，为开发存储器、传感器、执行器、自旋电子器件、太赫兹发射器、微型天线、能量收集等多种应用奠定了基础。
AI.conclusion: 多铁性材料是一个充满创新潜力的研究领域，不仅推动多功能器件的发展，还深化了对铁电和磁序相互作用机制的理解，磁电复合材料进一步扩展了其技术应用范围。

title: Chiral skyrmionic superconductivity from doping a Chern Ferromagnet
summary: We show that chiral superconductivity can be stabilized by hole doping a Chern ferromagnet. Performing exact diagonalization and density-matrix-renormalization-group calculations on the repulsive Kane-Mele-Hubbard model at hole doping relative to filling $ν=1$ electron per unit cell, we find that a Cooper pair formed by a magnon (spin-flip excitation) bound to two holes is stabilized at sufficiently strong interactions and sufficiently large Ising spin-orbit coupling (SOC). This Cooper pair exhibits both finite spin chirality -- signaling a noncoplanar skyrmionic spin texture -- and chiral $f$-wave symmetry. The pairing and spin chirality are set by the Chern number/polarization of the parent Chern ferromagnet. We further find that interactions between skyrmion Cooper pairs evolve from repulsive to attractive as the Ising SOC increases, revealing an intermediate-SOC region where chiral superconductivity can emerge from the condensation of hole-skyrmion Cooper pairs. Our findings provide a novel microscopic mechanism for chiral superconductivity and may be relevant for the recent observation of superconductivity in the MoTe$_2$ moiré superlattice.

AI.tldr: 在Chern铁磁体中通过空穴掺杂实现手性超导性，空穴与磁子形成具有手性f波对称性的skyrmion Cooper对
AI.motivation: 探索手性超导性的新微观机制，特别是与Chern铁磁体和skyrmion自旋纹理的关联，可能解释MoTe2莫尔超晶格中观察到的超导现象
AI.method: 使用精确对角化和密度矩阵重整化群方法研究排斥性Kane-Mele-Hubbard模型在空穴掺杂情况下的行为，分析磁子与两个空穴形成的Cooper对
AI.result: 发现足够强的相互作用和足够大的Ising自旋轨道耦合下，磁子与两个空穴形成的Cooper对具有有限自旋手性和手性f波对称性；随着SOC增加，skyrmion Cooper对之间的相互作用从排斥变为吸引
AI.conclusion: 提出了手性超导性的新微观机制，即通过空穴掺杂Chern铁磁体形成skyrmion Cooper对凝聚，这可能解释MoTe2莫尔超晶格中的超导现象

title: Quantum anomalous Hall conductivity in altermagnets under applied magnetic field
summary: We investigate the emergence of quantum anomalous Hall conductivity in a two-dimensional $d$-wave altermagnet on a Lieb lattice under an external magnetic field. Altermagnetic order induces momentum-dependent spin splitting without net magnetization in the relativistic limit, producing distinct spin-resolved bands at the $X$ and $Y$ valleys. The phase diagram features a normal insulator and a spin Chern insulator separated by an accidental Dirac semimetal. The magnetic field breaks rotational symmetry between valleys while maintaining vanishing total magnetization, enabling independent valley contributions to topology. One valley supports Chern numbers $C=-1$ or $0$, while the other hosts $C=0$ or $+1$, governed by field strength and bandwidth. This competition yields valley-dependent topology. Berry curvature analysis reveals fully gapped phases with total Chern numbers $C=\pm1$, separated by valley-selective gap closings. We uncover a mechanism for rapid magnetic control of the quantum anomalous Hall effect near the semimetal phase and highlight key distinctions from ferro-valleytronic and quantum spin Hall systems.

AI.tldr: 二维d波交变磁体在磁场下出现量子反常霍尔电导，通过谷依赖拓扑实现快速磁调控
AI.motivation: 研究交变磁性系统中量子反常霍尔效应的出现机制，探索不同于铁磁-谷电子和量子自旋霍尔系统的新拓扑特性
AI.method: 在Lieb晶格上构建二维d波交变磁体模型，施加外磁场破坏谷间旋转对称性，分析Berry曲率和Chern数等拓扑不变量
AI.result: 相图包含正常绝缘体、自旋Chern绝缘体和偶然狄拉克半金属；磁场调控下两个谷分别支持C=-1/0和C=0/+1，总Chern数可达±1；发现量子反常霍尔效应在狄拉克半金属相附近的快速磁调控机制
AI.conclusion: 交变磁体通过谷依赖拓扑和磁场调控实现了量子反常霍尔效应，为快速磁控拓扑电子学提供了新平台，与现有系统有本质区别

title: Hydrodynamic Backflow for Easing the Fermion Sign in Finite-Temperature Electron Path Integral Simulations
summary: Some notable systems, such as room-temperature superconductors and materials for controlled nuclear fusion, require an accurate description of finite-temperature quantum matter. Stochastic path integral methods are finite-temperature and numerically exact, but scale poorly with system size due the notorious Fermion sign problem. To somewhat mitigate this, we use a hydrodynamical backflow coordinate transformation. Our first attempt was a continuous normalizing flow machine learning approach to determine the optimal parameters. We found this to reduce the error of the total energy, approximately, three times at medium sign severity. Numerical issues challenged training effectively. Thus, a semi-analytic approach was developed to estimate the optimal parameters. We do this by using a derived expression dependent on a Bosonic observable. Hence, the calculation of these values does not have a sign problem. The resulting backflow transformations reduce the problem by multiple orders of magnitude, specifically, in the case of a harmonically trapped, two-dimensional electron gas at finite-temperature. The total energy of the system agrees with previous, backflow untransformed, studies and we calculate energies for up to 32 electrons. The limiting factor is found to be, primarily, the $O(N^3)$ calculation of the Jacobian, stemming from the coordinate transformation of the backflow. A more thorough implementation may further improve this scaling. Otherwise, a pathway for simulating electron systems at currently unreachable regimes is obtained. Finally, as a specific practical use case in energy storage systems, the quantum capacitance for graphene quantum dot materials is calculated.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种结合机器学习与半解析方法的流体动力学回流坐标变换技术，用于缓解有限温度量子多体系统中的费米子符号问题，显著降低了计算误差，并应用于石墨烯量子点材料的量子电容计算。
AI.motivation: 有限温度量子物质（如室温超导体、可控核聚变材料）需要精确描述，但随机路径积分方法存在严重的费米子符号问题，导致系统规模扩展性差，需要开发新方法来缓解这一问题。
AI.method: 采用流体动力学回流坐标变换，首先尝试连续归一化流机器学习方法优化参数，但因数值问题训练效果不佳；随后开发半解析方法，利用玻色子可观测量推导表达式来估计最优参数，避免了符号问题。
AI.result: 回流变换将问题降低了多个数量级，在有限温度下二维谐振势阱电子气系统中，总能量与先前未变换研究一致，计算了最多32个电子的能量；主要限制来自坐标变换雅可比行列式的O(N^3)计算复杂度。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为模拟当前无法触及的电子系统提供了途径，通过更彻底的实现可能进一步改善扩展性；作为具体应用案例，成功计算了石墨烯量子点材料的量子电容，展示了在储能系统中的实用价值。

title: Symmetry-Informed Term Filtering for Continuum Equation Discovery
summary: Discovering governing equations, whether manually or by data-driven methods, has been central in physics and related areas. Since governing equations are typically constrained by a set of symmetries, using symmetry constraints to restrict terms is usually the first step in manually formulating a governing equation, but it often becomes intractable for complex systems with high-order derivatives or multiple fields. When a data-driven method is used, on the other hand, imposing physical constraints such as symmetries typically requires manual preprocessing or computationally expensive iterative procedures. Here, we propose an algebraic filtering method that enumerates all symmetry-allowed terms for continuum equations within a finite candidate space. By treating symmetry generators as linear operators on the candidate space, we reduce the problem of enforcing both discrete and continuous symmetries to solving a set of linear kernel equations. The solution yields a provably complete list of permitted terms. We demonstrate the method's effectiveness by identifying invariant terms for systems with dihedral symmetry and recovering the governing equations for the Toner--Tu and Kardar--Parisi--Zhang systems, including higher-order terms useful for extending known models. The method provides a systematic way to obtain a symmetry-allowed search space for data-driven equation discovery, e.g., the sparse identification of nonlinear dynamics method.

AI.tldr: 提出一种代数过滤方法，通过将对称性生成元视为候选空间上的线性算子，将离散和连续对称性约束简化为求解线性核方程，从而系统生成对称性允许的项。
AI.motivation: 传统方法中，无论是手动推导还是数据驱动方法，施加对称性约束通常需要手动预处理或计算昂贵的迭代过程，对于具有高阶导数或多场的复杂系统变得难以处理。
AI.method: 代数过滤方法：将对称性生成元视为候选空间上的线性算子，将对称性约束问题转化为求解线性核方程，从而得到对称性允许项的完整列表。
AI.result: 成功识别了二面对称系统的不变项，恢复了Toner-Tu和Kardar-Parisi-Zhang系统的控制方程，包括用于扩展已知模型的高阶项。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为数据驱动方程发现（如稀疏识别非线性动力学方法）提供了系统获取对称性允许搜索空间的有效途径。

title: Definitive Assessment of the Accuracy, Variationality, and Convergence of Relativistic Coupled Cluster and Density Matrix Renormalization Group in 100-Orbital Space
summary: Accuracy, variationality, and convergence underpin the reliability of modern electronic structure methods, yet definitive benchmarks in the relativistic regime remain elusive due to the absence of numerically exact full configuration interaction (CI) references. Recent algorithmic advances in the CI framework, enabled by the small-tensor-product (STP) decomposition approach, have dramatically extended the tractable size of the configuration space, making numerically exact CI calculations feasible in large active spaces previously beyond reach. In this work, we employ the recently developed STP-CI framework to perform large-scale numerically exact CI calculations and directly benchmark relativistic coupled cluster and density matrix renormalization group methods. Definitive benchmarking of approximate relativistic electronic structure methods is ensured through the application of the gap theorem, which provides rigorous error bounds on the CI reference and establishes a controlled standard for assessing accuracy, variationality, and convergence.

AI.tldr: 使用STP-CI框架进行大规模数值精确CI计算，为相对论耦合簇和密度矩阵重整化群方法提供基准测试
AI.motivation: 相对论电子结构方法缺乏数值精确的完全组态相互作用参考，难以进行可靠基准测试
AI.method: 采用小张量积分解方法扩展组态空间，进行大规模数值精确CI计算，应用gap定理提供误差界
AI.result: 实现了先前无法达到的大活性空间中的数值精确CI计算，为相对论方法建立了受控标准
AI.conclusion: STP-CI框架结合gap定理为相对论电子结构方法提供了可靠的基准测试标准，确保准确性、变分性和收敛性的评估

title: Abrupt crystallization from shock-compressed CaSiO3 glass
summary: We have performed in situ time-resolved X-ray diffraction at ~100 GPa on laser-shocked CaSiO3 glass to investigate the glass-to-crystal transition. At this extreme pressure, we observe the ultrafast crystallization of the CaSiO3 perovskite structure from the compressed amorphous phase, with a typical nucleation time of 1.69 +/- 0.10 ns and a final grainsize of ~20 nm. The grain size temporal evolution suggest a diffusion controlled transformation. Moreover, the observed concomitant explosive grain growth together with the release wave arrival into shocked CaSiO3 also suggests a role of the release in the nucleation process.

AI.tldr: 在约100 GPa高压下，通过原位时间分辨X射线衍射观察激光冲击CaSiO3玻璃的超快结晶过程，发现钙钛矿结构在1.69±0.10 ns内成核，最终晶粒尺寸约20 nm。
AI.motivation: 研究在极端高压条件下（约100 GPa）玻璃到晶体的转变过程，特别是CaSiO3玻璃在激光冲击下的结晶动力学，这对于理解高压下非晶材料的相变行为具有重要意义。
AI.method: 采用原位时间分辨X射线衍射技术，在约100 GPa高压下对激光冲击的CaSiO3玻璃进行实时观测，分析其结晶过程的时间演化和晶粒生长行为。
AI.result: 观察到CaSiO3玻璃在高压下超快结晶为钙钛矿结构，典型成核时间为1.69±0.10 ns，最终晶粒尺寸约20 nm。晶粒尺寸的时间演化表明转变受扩散控制，同时观察到伴随释放波到达的爆炸性晶粒生长，表明释放过程在成核中起重要作用。
AI.conclusion: 在极端高压下，CaSiO3玻璃能够发生超快结晶形成钙钛矿结构，其结晶过程受扩散控制，且释放波的到达对成核过程有重要影响，这为理解高压下非晶材料的相变机制提供了新见解。

title: Strong nonlinear thermoelectricity generation and close-to-Carnot efficient heat engines in Superconductor-Insulator-2D electron gas junctions
comment: 5 pages, 4 figures, supplementary material after text
summary: We find that a novel Superconductor-Insulator-2D electron gas tunnel junction (SISm) strongly and efficiently generates thermoelectricity via a nonlinear mechanism. We simulate across the parameter space of the junction, finding and discussing different regimes with features useful for thermoelectricity generation or for specific applications. The generated Seebeck potential can go up to $6.75Δ_0$ with a huge nonlinear Seebeck coefficient, and efficiency can get very close to Carnot efficiency $η=0.96η_C$, a record for a solid-state device model. Thermoelectric performance is far better than analogous junctions, with fewer fabrication challenges, as the device can be fabricated via standard methods.

AI.tldr: SISm隧道结通过非线性机制高效产生热电效应，Seebeck电势可达6.75Δ₀，效率接近卡诺效率0.96η_C，创固态器件记录
AI.motivation: 探索新型超导体-绝缘体-2D电子气隧道结的非线性热电效应，寻找高效热电转换机制
AI.method: 模拟SISm结的参数空间，分析不同工作区域的特征，评估热电性能
AI.result: Seebeck电势高达6.75Δ₀，非线性Seebeck系数极大，效率接近卡诺效率0.96η_C，性能远超类似结且制造更简单
AI.conclusion: SISm结通过非线性机制实现高效热电转换，性能创纪录且易于制造，具有重要应用前景

title: Optimal skyrmion stability in antisymmetric ultrathin ferromagnetic bilayers
summary:
We demonstrate the stray-field-mediated skyrmion stabilizing
  capabilities of ultrathin exchange-decoupled antisymmetric
  ferromagnetic bilayers based on conventional transition metal
  materials. Using an asymptotically exact micromagnetic model valid
  in the ultrathin film limit, we show that the antisymmetric
  tailoring of the bilayer allows the Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya
  interaction and the dipolar interaction to act synergistically to
  stabilize skyrmions, in contrast to the monolayer case, in which
  these energies compete. To obtain optimal stability of these
  skyrmions against collapse and bursting -- the two fundamental
  processes determining skyrmion lifetime, we carry out an asymptotic
  analysis of the saddle point solution that separates the skyrmion
  from the demagnetized state. The result is an optimal stability line
  for compact skyrmions in the non-dimensional parameter space of the
  effective Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya interaction strength and the
  effective film thickness. Our predictions are confirmed by extensive
  micromagnetic simulations of antisymmetric bilayers, using magnetic
  parameters of the conventional Pt/Co/AlO$_x$ systems. Our results
  provide a new pathway for experimental observations of 10 nm radius
  zero-field skyrmions with lifetimes compatible with information
  technology applications.

AI.tldr: 利用超薄交换解耦反铁磁双层结构，通过杂散场协同DMI和偶极相互作用稳定斯格明子，实现10纳米半径零场斯格明子的长寿命稳定。
AI.motivation: 传统单层结构中Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya相互作用和偶极相互作用相互竞争，限制了斯格明子的稳定性。需要寻找新途径实现小尺寸、长寿命的斯格明子，以满足信息技术应用需求。
AI.method: 采用超薄薄膜极限下有效的渐近精确微磁模型，分析反铁磁双层结构。通过鞍点解的渐近分析确定斯格明子最优稳定性条件，并用Pt/Co/AlO$_x$系统的微磁模拟验证。
AI.result: 反铁磁双层结构使DMI和偶极相互作用协同作用，在有效DMI强度和有效膜厚度的无量纲参数空间中确定了紧凑斯格明子的最优稳定性线，预测了10纳米半径零场斯格明子的长寿命稳定。
AI.conclusion: 反铁磁双层结构为实验观测10纳米半径零场斯格明子提供了新途径，其寿命与信息技术应用兼容，为基于斯格明子的器件开发奠定了基础。

title: Moiré Mott correlated mosaics in twisted bilayer 1T-TaS$_2$
summary: The tunability and twist engineering of van der Waals materials enable the emergence of electronic states not present in individual monolayers. Among them, monolayer 1T-TaS$_2$ is a well-known Mott insulating system, whose star-of-David charge density wave reconstruction realizes an emergent triangular lattice of local magnetic moments. Interestingly, in its bulk form, the insulating gap is not correlation-driven, but stems from interlayer coupling. Here, we exploit the stacking-dependent nature of the insulating gap to show that in twisted 1T-TaS$_2$ bilayers, the spatially dependent competition between many-body and single-particle gaps creates Mott-trivial mosaic superlattices, featuring regions with local magnetic moments and non-magnetic insulating regions. We further demonstrate the tunability of the mosaic correlated state with an interlayer bias, giving rise to controllable charge transfer and quenching of correlations. Our results establish twisted 1T-TaS$_2$ as a flexible platform to engineer mixed spatially modulated correlated insulating phases, arising from the moiré profile.

AI.tldr: 扭曲双层1T-TaS₂中，通过堆叠依赖的绝缘隙竞争，形成了具有局部磁矩和非磁性绝缘区域的马赛克超晶格，可通过层间偏压调控相关态。
AI.motivation: 探索范德华材料扭曲工程中的新电子态，特别是利用1T-TaS₂单层（莫特绝缘体）与体相（层间耦合绝缘）的不同绝缘机制，在扭曲双层中实现空间调制的相关绝缘相。
AI.method: 利用扭曲双层1T-TaS₂中堆叠依赖的绝缘隙特性，通过空间依赖的多体（莫特）与单粒子（层间耦合）绝缘隙竞争，构建马赛克超晶格结构，并施加层间偏压进行调控。
AI.result: 成功实现了莫特-平凡马赛克超晶格，包含具有局部磁矩的区域和非磁性绝缘区域，且通过层间偏压可调控电荷转移和相关性的淬灭。
AI.conclusion: 扭曲1T-TaS₂为工程化混合空间调制相关绝缘相提供了灵活平台，其马赛克相关态可通过外部电场精确调控。

title: Invariant measures of exclusion processes with a look-ahead rule
summary: We study a one-dimensional exclusion process with a fixed jump length $I \ge 1$ in which a particle may advance or retreat $I$ sites provided all intermediate sites are vacant, with hopping rates of Arrhenius type depending on the local headway. We identify the class of rates admitting an explicit Ising-Gibbs invariant measure, with stationarity governed by pairwise balance rather than detailed balance. In the thermodynamic limit, we derive a closed-form stationary current that recovers the mean-field prediction for look-ahead traffic flow models exactly when particles are uncorrelated, and quantifies the correlation-induced correction for non-trivial interactions, illustrated with two explicit families of interaction potentials.

AI.tldr: 研究具有固定跳跃长度I的一维排斥过程，粒子可前进或后退I个位置（要求中间位置为空），跳跃速率服从Arrhenius型并依赖于局部间距。识别了具有显式Ising-Gibbs不变测度的速率类别，其平稳性由成对平衡而非细致平衡控制。在热力学极限下推导出闭合形式的平稳流，当粒子无关联时精确恢复前瞻交通流模型的平均场预测，并量化了非平凡相互作用下的关联诱导修正。
AI.motivation: 研究具有固定跳跃长度的排斥过程，特别是前瞻交通流模型，其中粒子可以跳跃多个位置。传统平均场方法假设粒子无关联，但实际系统中粒子间存在相关性。本文旨在识别允许精确解析解的系统，并量化关联效应对平稳流的影响。
AI.method: 研究一维排斥过程，粒子可前进或后退I个位置（要求中间位置为空），跳跃速率采用Arrhenius型并依赖于局部间距。识别了允许显式Ising-Gibbs不变测度的速率类别，其平稳性由成对平衡而非细致平衡控制。在热力学极限下推导闭合形式的平稳流表达式。
AI.result: 推导出闭合形式的平稳流表达式，当粒子无关联时精确恢复前瞻交通流模型的平均场预测。对于非平凡相互作用，量化了关联诱导修正。通过两个明确的相互作用势家族进行了具体说明。
AI.conclusion: 识别了具有显式Ising-Gibbs不变测度的排斥过程速率类别，其平稳性由成对平衡控制。在热力学极限下获得闭合形式的平稳流，精确量化了关联效应对交通流的影响，为前瞻交通流模型提供了超越平均场近似的解析理解。

title: Resetting optimized competitive first-passage outcomes in non-Markovian systems
summary: We investigate the role of stochastic resetting in non-Markovian systems, where memory effects arise due to slow relaxation, rugged energy landscapes, disordered environments, and molecular crowding. Using the celebrated continuous-time random walk (CTRW) framework, we analyze first-passage processes with multiple competing outcomes and examine how resetting can selectively enhance desired events. We characterize the efficiency of resetting through conditional mean first-passage times (MFPTs) and demonstrate that its impact is highly sensitive to the underlying waiting-time statistics. Furthermore, we derive an inequality that quantifies how resetting controls fluctuations in conditional first-passage times (FPTs), revealing regimes where variability is significantly suppressed. Our results provide a systematic understanding of how long-term memory influences competitive first-passage outcomes and establish resetting as a powerful control mechanism beyond the conventional Markovian setting.

AI.tldr: 研究随机重置在非马尔可夫系统中的角色，分析重置如何选择性地增强期望事件并控制首次通过时间的波动
AI.motivation: 探索在具有记忆效应的非马尔可夫系统中，随机重置如何影响竞争性首次通过过程，特别是在慢弛豫、崎岖能量景观、无序环境和分子拥挤等条件下
AI.method: 使用连续时间随机游走框架，分析具有多个竞争结果的首次通过过程，通过条件平均首次通过时间和不等式量化重置效率
AI.result: 重置的影响对底层等待时间统计高度敏感，能够选择性地增强期望事件，并在某些区域显著抑制条件首次通过时间的波动
AI.conclusion: 长期记忆影响竞争性首次通过结果，重置是超越传统马尔可夫设置的有力控制机制

title: Machine Learning Interatomic Potentials for Million-Atom Simulations of Multicomponent Alloys
summary: Machine learning interatomic potentials (MLIPs) with broad chemical flexibility are important for atomistic simulations of compositionally complex materials such as high-entropy alloys. Here, we study two state-of-the-art MLIP frameworks, the neuroevolution potential (NEP) and the graph atomic cluster expansion (GRACE), for 16 elemental metals and multicomponent alloys. GRACE potential with Finnis-Sinclair type shows substantially higher training efficiency and consistently, though only slightly, better accuracy for mechanical properties, thermal stability, and chemical extrapolation. In contrast, NEP achieves an approximately 60-fold higher inference speed, making it attractive for million-atom molecular dynamics simulations. We further examine uncertainty quantification strategies and find that ensemble-based uncertainty correlates robustly with model error, whereas D-optimality is less reliable for the systems considered here. Large-scale nonequilibrium molecular dynamics simulations of shock propagation further show that NEP, combined with ensemble-based uncertainty quantification, enables efficient and reliable simulations under extreme dynamic conditions.

AI.tldr: 该研究比较了两种机器学习原子间势能模型（NEP和GRACE）在金属和合金中的性能，发现GRACE训练效率更高、精度略好，而NEP推理速度快60倍，更适合大规模分子动力学模拟。不确定性量化方面，集成方法比D-最优性更可靠。
AI.motivation: 开发具有广泛化学灵活性的机器学习原子间势能模型对于高熵合金等成分复杂材料的原子尺度模拟至关重要。需要评估不同MLIP框架的性能差异，以指导实际应用选择。
AI.method: 研究比较了两种先进的MLIP框架：神经进化势能（NEP）和图原子团簇展开（GRACE），在16种元素金属和多组分合金上进行测试。评估了训练效率、精度、机械性能、热稳定性和化学外推能力。还检验了不确定性量化策略，包括集成方法和D-最优性。
AI.result: GRACE（Finnis-Sinclair类型）显示出显著更高的训练效率和略好的精度。NEP推理速度快约60倍，适合百万原子分子动力学模拟。集成不确定性量化与模型误差稳健相关，而D-最优性在测试系统中可靠性较差。大规模非平衡分子动力学模拟表明，NEP结合集成不确定性量化可在极端动态条件下实现高效可靠模拟。
AI.conclusion: NEP和GRACE各有优势：GRACE训练效率高、精度略好，适合精度要求高的应用；NEP推理速度快，适合大规模模拟。集成不确定性量化是可靠的质量控制方法。NEP结合不确定性量化为极端条件下的可靠模拟提供了有效工具。

title: Suppression of the tendency toward antiferromagnetic order in the Dirac semimetal SrIrO$_3$
summary: The entangled charge and spin dynamics in strongly electron correlated system has been a fruitful playground for exploring new physical phenomena. Here with resonant inelastic X-ray scattering we studied the spin dynamics of SrIrO$_3$, a half-filled paramagnetic semimetal hosting highly itinerant Dirac Fermions due to its topological band structure. Our results show that its magnetic excitations share much similarity to the ordered compounds upon Sn substitution in exchange strength and AFM instability, while the system maintains spin non-ordered. Further, the non-ordered pristine SrIrO$_3$ hosts even longer lifetime magnetic excitations near the AFM zone center comparing to the Sn substituted ordered compounds, contrary to general expectation. These observations indicate an interesting connection between band topology and electron correlation in SrIrO$_3$.

AI.tldr: 通过共振非弹性X射线散射研究SrIrO₃的自旋动力学，发现其磁性激发与Sn替代有序化合物相似但寿命更长，揭示了能带拓扑与电子关联的有趣联系
AI.motivation: 研究强电子关联系统中电荷与自旋动力学的纠缠现象，探索SrIrO₃这一半填充顺磁半金属中拓扑能带结构与电子关联的相互作用
AI.method: 使用共振非弹性X射线散射技术研究SrIrO₃的自旋动力学，对比分析原始样品与Sn替代有序化合物的磁性激发特性
AI.result: SrIrO₃的磁性激发在交换强度和反铁磁不稳定性方面与Sn替代有序化合物相似，但未形成自旋有序；原始SrIrO₃在反铁磁区中心附近的磁性激发寿命甚至比有序化合物更长，与一般预期相反
AI.conclusion: 这些观察结果表明SrIrO₃中存在能带拓扑与电子关联之间的有趣联系，为理解强关联系统中的新奇物理现象提供了新视角

title: Beyond dynamic scaling: rare events break universality
comment: Submitted; 8 pages and 10 figures (main text and Appendix)
summary: Surface growth driven by non-monomeric deposition has remained largely unexplored. We investigate a model based on the deposition of blobs with a power-law size distribution $P(s)\sim s^{-τ}$. We find that the critical exponents vary continuously with $τ$, recovering Kardar--Parisi--Zhang behavior only for $τ\ge 3$. For $τ<3$, roughness scaling exhibits strong corrections and scale invariance breaks down. We show that this behavior originates from the emergence of a second dynamical length scale $ζ$, corresponding to the linear size of the largest cluster, in addition to the usual correlation length $ξ$. The coexistence of these two relevant scales signals the breakdown of the usual Family--Vicsek scaling. These results point to a new phenomenology of surface growth beyond the standard scale-invariant paradigm.

AI.tldr: 研究非单体沉积驱动的表面生长，发现当沉积斑块尺寸分布为幂律时，临界指数随指数τ连续变化，仅当τ≥3时恢复KPZ行为，τ<3时粗糙度标度出现强修正且标度不变性破缺。
AI.motivation: 探索非单体沉积驱动的表面生长现象，这类过程在以往研究中较少涉及，特别是当沉积单元不是单体而是具有幂律尺寸分布的斑块时，表面生长行为可能超出标准标度不变性范式。
AI.method: 建立基于幂律尺寸分布P(s)∼s^{-τ}的斑块沉积模型，通过分析临界指数随τ的变化、粗糙度标度行为，以及引入第二个动力学长度尺度ζ（最大簇的线性尺寸）来解释标度不变性破缺。
AI.result: 发现临界指数随τ连续变化，仅当τ≥3时恢复KPZ行为；τ<3时粗糙度标度出现强修正，标度不变性破缺；揭示了第二个相关长度尺度ζ的存在，其与通常的相关长度ξ共存导致Family-Vicsek标度破缺。
AI.conclusion: 非单体沉积驱动的表面生长展现出超越标准标度不变性范式的新现象学，当沉积斑块尺寸分布为幂律且τ<3时，系统出现两个相关长度尺度，导致传统标度关系失效，为表面生长研究开辟了新方向。

title: Quantum-Information Measure of Electron Localization
summary: Understanding electron localization in molecules and materials plays a central role in electronic structure theory, and will increase in importance with the rise of data driven approaches. The electron localization function (ELF) is widely used to visualize electron organization in molecules and materials, and it remains a central ingredient in modern density functional approximations. Yet its formulation retains highly empirical elements. Here we introduce a fully non empirical measure of electron localization derived from the concurrence of a correlated two spin mixed state. This construction yields a genuine two point localization indicator grounded in quantum information theory, removing the ad hoc steps underlying the ELF. We show that atomic shells, covalent and ionic bonds, lone pairs, molecular dissociation, and charge transfer processes are captured. The method is straightforward to evaluate numerically.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于量子信息理论中两自旋混合态并发度的全新非经验性电子局域化度量方法，替代传统经验性的电子局域化函数(ELF)
AI.motivation: 传统电子局域化函数(ELF)虽然广泛用于可视化分子和材料中的电子组织，但其公式仍包含高度经验性元素，需要更严格的理论基础
AI.method: 从关联两自旋混合态的并发度推导出完全非经验性的电子局域化度量，构建基于量子信息理论的真实两点局域化指标
AI.result: 该方法能准确描述原子壳层、共价键和离子键、孤对电子、分子解离和电荷转移过程，且数值计算简便
AI.conclusion: 提出了一种理论基础更严格、完全非经验性的电子局域化度量方法，为电子结构理论和数据驱动方法提供了更可靠的局域化分析工具

title: Generalized Beth-Uhlenbeck Approach to the 2+1D Gross-Neveu Model
summary: We study the thermodynamics of the (2+1) dimensional Gross-Neveu model inspired from graphene. We focus on the entropy density of the Gaussian fluctuation beyond the mean field. The full in-medium, momentum-dependent evaluation reveals that the fluctuations give a substantial contribution, even comparable to that of the mean field. We argue that the back-reaction from the fluctuations to the mean field should be included, which reduces the contribution mainly coming from the Landau-damping region. To treat this self-consistently, we use the generalized version of the Beth-Uhlenbeck approach for the entropy density. Compared with the standard Beth-Uhlenbeck formulation, the generalized version suppresses the low-energy contributions while preserving the bound-state effects. The fractional entropy carried by bound excitons and free fermions reveals a sharper crossover of the degrees of freedom in the generalized version, which is consistent with Mott-transition physics in two-dimensional materials.

AI.tldr: 研究(2+1)维Gross-Neveu模型中高斯涨落的热力学，发现涨落对熵密度的贡献与平均场相当，需考虑涨落对平均场的反作用
AI.motivation: 研究受石墨烯启发的(2+1)维Gross-Neveu模型的热力学性质，特别关注高斯涨落对熵密度的贡献，理解涨落效应在二维材料中的重要性
AI.method: 使用广义Beth-Uhlenbeck方法计算熵密度，考虑涨落对平均场的自洽反作用，进行全介质、动量依赖的评估
AI.result: 涨落对熵密度的贡献与平均场相当，广义Beth-Uhlenbeck方法抑制了低能贡献但保留了束缚态效应，束缚激子和自由费米子的分数熵显示更尖锐的交叉行为
AI.conclusion: 涨落效应在(2+1)维Gross-Neveu模型中至关重要，广义Beth-Uhlenbeck方法能更好地描述二维材料中的Mott转变物理，涨落反作用显著影响熵密度贡献

title: Entropic crystallization of geometrically frustrated magnets on 1/1 approximant Tsai-type quasicrystal
summary: We have studied the antiferromagnetic Ising model on the icosahedral bcc lattice, as a model system of 1/1 approximant Tsai-type quasicrystals. We addressed thermal equilibrium properties of this system with Markov-chain Monte Carlo simulation supplemented with the parallel tempering technique to accelerate the relaxation dynamics. As a result, we found a second-order phase transition takes place to the magnetic ordered phase with ${\mathbb Z_3}\times {\mathbb Z_2}$ symmetry breaking. Despite the ordering, the low-temperature phase keeps macroscopic degeneracy as identified by finite residual entropy, $\mathcal{S}\sim0.1767/{\rm spin}$. Remarkably, the existence of residual entropy turns out to play a major role in the formation of magnetic order. Generation of domain wall is suppressed, as it reduces the residual entropy locally stored in icosahedra, beyond the gain of configurational entropy due to domain wall patterns. Magnetic order arises out of this competition as entropic crystallization, which manifest universal mechanism of strongly frustrated systems with large geometrical units.

AI.tldr: 研究了二十面体bcc晶格上的反铁磁Ising模型，作为1/1近似Tsai型准晶的模型系统，发现存在二阶相变到磁有序相，但低温相仍保持宏观简并性，具有有限剩余熵。
AI.motivation: 研究Tsai型准晶的1/1近似系统中的反铁磁Ising模型，探索强几何阻挫系统中磁有序形成的普遍机制。
AI.method: 使用马尔可夫链蒙特卡洛模拟结合并行回火技术来加速弛豫动力学，研究系统的热平衡性质。
AI.result: 发现了二阶相变到具有${\mathbb Z_3}\times {\mathbb Z_2}$对称性破缺的磁有序相，但低温相仍保持宏观简并性，剩余熵约为0.1767/自旋。
AI.conclusion: 剩余熵在磁有序形成中起主要作用，畴壁生成受到抑制，因为这会减少二十面体局部存储的剩余熵，磁有序作为熵结晶从这种竞争中产生，这是具有大几何单元的强阻挫系统的普遍机制。

title: Universal features of nonequilibrium Ising models in contact with two thermal reservoirs
summary: We derive generic properties of nonequilibrium phase transitions in all-to-all Ising models placed in contact with two thermal reservoirs, in which parameters (temperatures, interactions and field parameters) assume arbitrary values depending on the contact with each thermal bath. The presence of different kinds of external parameters leads to remarkably different sort of phase transitions. While continuous, discontinuous and even tricritical points are presented when external parameters are symmetric (e.g. the case of energetic barriers or different couplings between the system and thermal baths), the tricriticality is absent when external parameters are antisymmetric (e.g. the case of magnetic fields or biased drivings) implying that solely critical or discontinuous are possible. In such latter case, the probability distribution acquires the Boltzmann-Gibbs like form, irrespectively the model parameters when the switching between thermal reservoirs is sufficiently fast. Our work sheds light about the differences between equilibrium and nonequilibrium ingredients and theirs consequences upon phase transitions.

AI.tldr: 研究全耦合伊辛模型与两个热库接触时的非平衡相变特性，发现对称参数产生连续、不连续甚至三临界点，而反对称参数只产生临界或不连续相变，无三临界点。
AI.motivation: 探索非平衡条件下相变与平衡相变的差异，理解不同外部参数（温度、相互作用、场参数）如何影响相变类型，揭示平衡与非平衡因素对相变的不同影响。
AI.method: 分析全耦合伊辛模型与两个热库接触的系统，考虑参数（温度、相互作用、场参数）随热库接触任意变化的情况，研究对称和反对称参数配置下的相变行为。
AI.result: 对称外部参数（如能垒、系统与热库的不同耦合）产生连续、不连续和三临界点；反对称参数（如磁场、偏置驱动）只产生临界或不连续相变，无三临界点。当热库切换足够快时，概率分布呈现玻尔兹曼-吉布斯形式。
AI.conclusion: 非平衡相变特性强烈依赖于参数对称性，对称与反对称参数导致不同类型的相变行为，揭示了平衡与非平衡因素对相变的不同影响机制。

title: Electrochemical doping in H-terminated diamond films: Impact of O-functionalization and insights from in-situ Raman spectro electrochemistry
