summary: The p-type surface conductivity of H-terminated diamond (HD, H-diamond) has created new path ways for developing diamond based electronic devices as well as chemical and bio-sensors. However, the hydrophobic nature of the HD surface can negatively impact device performance due to its low wettability. Herein, we report the study on polymer electrolyte-gated field effect transistors (EGFETs) fabricated using pristine and partially O-terminated HD films. The HD surface is transformed from hydrophobic to moderate hydrophilic by partial O-termination. Also, the sheet resistance of the HD surface increases from 7.6 to 18.7 k-Ohms per sq. while the sheet hole density decreases from 10.5 to 4.8 x 10^12 cm^-2 upon partial O-termination. Consequently, the ON - OFF ratio of the EGFET devices decreases from ~ 40 to 14 and the maximum transconductance declines from of -150 to -7.9 micro-seimens per V, but the areal capacitance increases from ~ 7.8 to 27.1 microFarad per cm^2 with partial ozonation on HD surface. In addition the in situ Raman measurements in HD EGFET provide direct experimental evidence of a gating-induced blue shift and linewidth broadening of the diamond Raman band which are associated with strong electron phonon coupling. This work highlights the significant impact of the partial O-termination on the performance of the HD EGFET devices and effect of electrochemical gating on the phonon behaviour of the H-diamond.

AI.tldr: 研究部分氧终止对氢终止金刚石表面性质及聚合物电解质栅场效应晶体管性能的影响，发现氧终止改善表面亲水性但降低电学性能，同时通过原位拉曼揭示了电化学栅压对金刚石声子行为的调控。
AI.motivation: 氢终止金刚石具有p型表面导电性，可用于电子器件和传感器，但其疏水性会影响器件性能。研究部分氧终止对表面性质和器件性能的影响，以优化金刚石基电子器件。
AI.method: 制备原始和部分氧终止的氢终止金刚石薄膜，构建聚合物电解质栅场效应晶体管，测量表面电阻、空穴密度、器件开关比、跨导和面电容等参数，并进行原位拉曼光谱分析。
AI.result: 部分氧终止使表面从疏水变为适度亲水，但表面电阻从7.6增至18.7 kΩ/□，空穴密度从10.5降至4.8×10^12 cm^-2；器件开关比从~40降至14，跨导从-150降至-7.9 μS/V，面电容从~7.8增至27.1 μF/cm^2；原位拉曼显示栅压诱导金刚石拉曼峰蓝移和线宽展宽。
AI.conclusion: 部分氧终止显著改变氢终止金刚石表面性质，在改善亲水性的同时降低电学性能，揭示了表面化学修饰与电化学栅压对金刚石器件性能和声子行为的双重调控作用。

title: Detecting Symmetry-Resolved Entanglement: A Quantum Monte Carlo Approach
summary: Symmetry and entanglement are two fundamental concepts in quantum many-body physics. Their interplay is captured by symmetry-resolved entanglement, which decomposes the total entanglement into contributions from different symmetry sectors. Computing symmetry-resolved entanglement in strongly interacting higher-dimensional quantum systems remains challenging. Here, we introduce a quantum Monte Carlo (QMC) approach for computing symmetry-resolved Rényi entropies (SRRE) in large-scale interacting systems by measuring disorder (symmetry-twisted) operators on replica manifolds and reconstructing SRRE from the corresponding charged moments. We apply this method to the transverse-field Ising model (TFIM) in one and two dimensions. In one dimension, we recover the conformal-field-theory prediction for the logarithmic scaling of the disorder operator and observe the expected approach to entanglement equipartition. In two dimensions, our data provide numerical evidence consistent with entanglement equipartition at the (2+1)D Ising critical point. We further apply the framework to the 1D Heisenberg chain and obtain results consistent with the expected asymptotic scaling and finite-size corrections in the U(1)-resolved sectors. Our work establishes a practical numerical route to symmetry-resolved entanglement in interacting lattice models and provides a useful framework for future studies beyond one dimension.

AI.tldr: 提出一种量子蒙特卡洛方法计算对称性分辨的纠缠熵，应用于横场伊辛模型和海森堡链，验证了纠缠均分现象。
AI.motivation: 对称性和纠缠是量子多体物理中的两个基本概念，它们的相互作用体现在对称性分辨的纠缠中。然而，在强相互作用的高维量子系统中计算对称性分辨的纠缠仍然具有挑战性。
AI.method: 引入量子蒙特卡洛方法，通过在副本流形上测量无序（对称扭曲）算符，并从相应的带电矩重建对称性分辨的Rényi熵。
AI.result: 在一维横场伊辛模型中恢复了共形场论预测的对数标度行为，并观察到纠缠均分的预期趋势。在二维中，数据为(2+1)D伊辛临界点的纠缠均分提供了数值证据。在一维海森堡链中获得了与预期渐近标度和有限尺寸修正一致的结果。
AI.conclusion: 这项工作为相互作用晶格模型中的对称性分辨纠缠建立了一条实用的数值计算路径，并为未来超越一维的研究提供了有用的框架。

title: Understanding ultrafast x-ray 'echoes' diffracted from single crystals
summary: Multiple x-ray beams generated by interference processes in perfect crystals were imaged with a resolution of about 100nm using tele-ptychography in the diffraction direction. These multiple wave-fields, also known as x-ray diffraction echoes, are related to the process known as the Pendelloesung effect and are described by dynamical diffraction theory. The echoes are produced by the constructive interference of diffracted x-rays at the exit surface of the crystal sample. In the imaged diffraction peak, we observed 10 echoes maxima with a total signal length of 78 um. Which translates into a total temporal delay in the signal of less than 108 fs.This makes the echoes of high importance for x-ray optics at x-ray Free Electron Laser sources, as the effect could be used for future ultrafast x-ray beam splitters. In addition to this application, echoes can be exploited to follow ultrafast processes in single crystal micro-structures such as melting or strain propagation.

AI.tldr: 利用衍射方向远场叠层成像技术，以约100纳米分辨率成像了完美晶体中干涉过程产生的多束X射线，观测到10个衍射回波峰，总信号长度78微米，对应小于108飞秒的时间延迟。
AI.motivation: 研究完美晶体中X射线干涉产生的多波场（衍射回波），这些回波与Pendelloesung效应相关，由衍射X射线在晶体出射面的相长干涉产生。这些效应对于X射线自由电子激光器的光学应用和超快过程研究具有重要意义。
AI.method: 采用衍射方向的远场叠层成像技术，以约100纳米的分辨率对完美晶体中产生的多束X射线进行成像。该方法基于X射线在晶体中的干涉过程，利用衍射回波现象进行观测。
AI.result: 在成像的衍射峰中观测到10个回波极大值，总信号长度为78微米，对应小于108飞秒的总时间延迟。这些衍射回波与Pendelloesung效应一致，可用作超快X射线分束器。
AI.conclusion: X射线衍射回波对于X射线自由电子激光器光学具有重要意义，可作为未来超快X射线分束器。此外，回波还可用于追踪单晶微结构中的超快过程，如熔融或应变传播。

title: Spatial Correlations Restore Zwanzig's Mean-Field Diffusion Result in Rugged Energy Landscapes
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2512.22015
summary: Transport in disordered environments is often controlled not by typical fluctuations but by rare, extreme events that dominate long-time dynamics. In such settings, Zwanzig's classic mean-field theory predicts that energetic roughness reduces the diffusion coefficient by an exponential factor governed solely by the variance of the disorder. However, this prediction breaks down in uncorrelated Gaussian landscapes, where rare but deep multi-site traps dominate transport and lead to a much stronger suppression of diffusion. Here, we present a unified theoretical framework that clarifies both the origin of this breakdown and its resolution. We show that Zwanzig's local averaging can be interpreted as a Gaussian cumulant expansion whose validity is destroyed by uncorrelated disorder through the emergence of extreme trapping events. Introducing Gaussian spatial correlations fundamentally reshapes the landscape: roughness increments become smoother, asymmetric multi-site traps are suppressed, and the statistics of escape pathways are regularized. As a result, Zwanzig's exponential scaling is recovered. We provide an explicit analytical derivation demonstrating how spatial correlations modify trap statistics and restore mean-field diffusion, complemented by illustrative numerical examples showing the dramatic reduction of escape times in correlated landscapes.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了一个统一理论框架，解释了无序环境中扩散的异常抑制现象，并展示了空间相关性如何恢复经典的Zwanzig平均场预测。
AI.motivation: 经典Zwanzig平均场理论预测无序环境中的扩散系数仅由无序方差决定，但在无相关高斯势场中，罕见的深陷阱会主导输运并导致更强的扩散抑制，这一理论与实际不符的矛盾需要解释和解决。
AI.method: 建立统一理论框架，将Zwanzig局部平均解释为高斯累积展开，分析无相关无序如何破坏该展开的有效性。引入高斯空间相关性来重塑势场景观，抑制不对称多站点陷阱，正则化逃逸路径统计。
AI.result: 空间相关性通过平滑粗糙度增量、抑制多站点陷阱、正则化逃逸路径统计，恢复了Zwanzig指数标度关系。理论推导和数值模拟均显示相关势场中逃逸时间显著减少。
AI.conclusion: 空间相关性在无序环境中对扩散行为具有关键调节作用，它通过抑制极端陷阱事件，使系统恢复经典的Zwanzig平均场预测，为理解复杂环境中的输运现象提供了新视角。

title: Elastic softening and fracture in randomly perforated solids
summary: We study the mechanical response of quasi-brittle polymethyl methacrylate (PMMA) specimens containing controlled random distributions of laser-cut holes. Tensile tests combined with digital image correlation reveal a nearly linear decrease of the Young's modulus with porosity, but with a softening rate far exceeding classical effective medium theory and the Hashin-Shtrikman bound. The extrapolated critical porosity at which the modulus vanishes is well below the 2D percolation threshold, indicating that ideal cylindrical void models fail to capture the observed behavior. Microscopy shows irregular pore geometries and frequent coalescence, which effectively act as crack-like defects and strongly enhance compliance. The rupture stress distributions are well described by a Weibull model accounting for both load-bearing area reduction and stress concentration at hole edges. Digital image correlation reveals heterogeneous but non-localized deformation, with strain increasingly correlated with the hole pattern, indicating a growing influence of defect-induced stress concentrations. These results highlight the dominant role of defect morphology in governing stiffness degradation and fracture statistics in porous quasi-brittle materials.

AI.tldr: 多孔准脆性PMMA材料的力学性能研究表明，孔隙形态（而非仅孔隙率）主导刚度退化和断裂统计，不规则孔洞和孔洞合并产生类似裂纹的缺陷效应。
AI.motivation: 研究准脆性材料中孔隙对力学性能的影响，传统有效介质理论和理想圆柱孔洞模型无法准确预测实际多孔材料的力学响应，需要探究孔隙形态和分布的真实影响。
AI.method: 使用激光切割在PMMA试样中制造可控随机分布的孔洞，进行拉伸试验并结合数字图像相关技术（DIC）测量变形，通过显微镜观察孔隙几何形状和合并情况。
AI.result: 杨氏模量随孔隙率线性下降但速率远超经典理论；临界孔隙率远低于二维渗流阈值；不规则孔隙几何和孔洞合并产生类似裂纹的缺陷效应；断裂应力分布符合考虑承载面积减少和应力集中的Weibull模型；DIC显示变形异质但不局部化，应变与孔洞模式相关性增强。
AI.conclusion: 孔隙形态（而非仅孔隙率）在准脆性多孔材料的刚度退化和断裂统计中起主导作用，不规则孔洞和孔洞合并产生的裂纹状缺陷显著增强材料柔度，传统理想孔洞模型无法准确描述实际行为。

title: Power laws, anisotropy and center-of-mass conservation in mass transport processes
summary: We present exact results for steady-state density correlation functions in conserved-mass transport processes with {\it anisotropic}, reflection-symmetric hopping on a $d-$dimensional hypercubic lattice. In addition to mass conservation, we consider center-of-mass (CoM) conservation, imposed either along a specific axis or along all axes. CoM-conserving dynamics is implemented through coordinated {\it multidirectional} hopping of two equal chunks of masses in {\it opposite} directions. While anisotropy and mass conservation are known to generate power-law density correlations $C({\bf x}) \sim 1/|{\bf x}|^d$ at large distance $|{\bf x}| \gg 1$ {\it [Phys. Rev. A {\bf 42}, 1954 (1990)]}, an additional CoM conservation can qualitatively alter the nature of the power law. Indeed, when CoM is conserved in {\it all} directions, the correlations decay faster $-$ typically as $C({\bf x}) \sim 1/|{\bf x}|^{(d+2)}$, regardless of the presence (or absence) of anisotropy. Consequently, the systems exhibit an extreme {\it hyperuniformity} (``class I''), where the long-wavelength density fluctuations, despite the slow power-law decay, are anomalously suppressed. When CoM is conserved along particular ({\it not} all) directions, the slower $1/|{\bf x}|^{d}$ power-law decay is recovered. The above behavior can be understood from an analogy between the correlation function and an electrostatic potential: While a (rank-$2$) quadrupolar charge distribution gives rise to the $1/|{\bf x}|^{d}$ power law, the $1/|{\bf x}|^{(d+2)}$ power law originates from a higher-order (rank-$4$) multipolar charge distribution. These findings reveal a rich interplay between anisotropy and CoM conservation in nonequilibrium steady states.

AI.tldr: 研究各向异性质量输运过程中质心守恒对密度关联函数的影响，发现全方向质心守恒导致关联函数以1/|x|^(d+2)衰减，产生极端超均匀性。
AI.motivation: 探索各向异性质量输运过程中，质心守恒如何影响稳态密度关联函数的幂律衰减行为，揭示各向异性与守恒律之间的相互作用。
AI.method: 在d维超立方格点上研究具有反射对称性的各向异性质量输运过程，考虑质量守恒和质心守恒（沿特定轴或所有轴），通过协调的多方向反向质量块跳跃实现质心守恒。
AI.result: 当质心在所有方向都守恒时，密度关联函数以C(x)∼1/|x|^(d+2)衰减，表现出极端超均匀性（"class I"）；当质心仅沿特定方向守恒时，恢复较慢的1/|x|^d衰减。
AI.conclusion: 质心守恒能显著改变各向异性质量输运系统的密度关联函数衰减行为，全方向质心守恒导致更高阶的多极子电荷分布，产生更快的幂律衰减和极端超均匀性。

title: Switching between Antiferromagnetic and Ferromagnetic Skyrmions in Two-Dimensional Magnets
summary: Antiferromagnetic (AFM) and ferromagnetic (FM) skyrmions possess unique advantages for spintronic applications. AFM skyrmions eliminate the skyrmion Hall effect and exhibit fast dynamics, whereas FM skyrmions are easier to nucleate and manipulate. However, realizing a transition between AFM and FM skyrmions within the same two-dimensional (2D) material has remained elusive. Here, using first-principles calculations and atomistic spin simulations on the Janus monolayer Cr2Ge2Te3S3, we demonstrate that strain-driven modulation of magnetic interactions enables switching between AFM and FM skyrmion phases. A compressive strain of $-3\%$ induces an AFM ground state hosting AFM skyrmions, while a tensile strain of $+2\%$ drives the system into a FM skyrmion phase. Moreover, under an out-of-plane magnetic field, FM skyrmions are rapidly transformed into a uniform FM phase, while AFM skyrmions transform into AFM bimerons under stronger fields. These findings establish a framework for controllable transitions between topological magnetic states in a single 2D material.

AI.tldr: 通过应变调控二维Janus材料Cr2Ge2Te3S3中的磁相互作用，实现了AFM和FM斯格明子之间的可逆相变。
AI.motivation: AFM斯格明子无斯格明子霍尔效应且动力学快，FM斯格明子易于产生和操控，但在同一二维材料中实现两者相变尚未实现。
AI.method: 使用第一性原理计算和原子自旋模拟研究Janus单层Cr2Ge2Te3S3，通过应变调控磁相互作用。
AI.result: -3%压缩应变诱导AFM基态和AFM斯格明子，+2%拉伸应变诱导FM斯格明子相；外加磁场下FM斯格明子快速转变为均匀FM相，AFM斯格明子在强场下转变为AFM双半子。
AI.conclusion: 建立了在单一二维材料中实现拓扑磁态可控相变的框架，为自旋电子学应用提供了新平台。

title: Phonon Thermal Hall Effect in quartz and its absence in silica
summary: The observation of a misalignment between the applied heat flux and the measured temperature gradient in insulating solids induced by magnetic field has become a subject of experimental investigation, theoretical speculation, and unsettled controversy. To identify the origin of this phonon thermal Hall effect, we performed a comparative study of longitudinal and transverse heat transport in crystalline (quartz) and vitreous (silica) SiO$_2$ using identical experimental set-ups and thermometers. A finite signal was detected in the crystalline samples and none in the amorphous sample, within our resolution. The cleaner crystal exhibited a larger thermal Hall conductivity than the dirtier one, ruling out disorder as the driver of the effect. On the other hand, the amplitude of the transverse thermal resistivity is almost identical in the two crystalline samples (W$_{\perp}$/B$\approx 10^{-6}$ m.K.W$^{-1}$.T$^{-1}$). We show that in a phonon gas, as in a molecular gas displaying the Senftleben-Beenakker effect, heat is conducted through two channels, and argue that a thermal Hall response is unavoidable whenever these channels differ both in entropy production and in their coupling to the magnetic field. Under such conditions, the conserved energy current and the non-conserved entropy current cease to be parallel. Finally, the magnitude of the transverse thermal resistivity can be accounted for by a surprisingly simple picture. The heat flux induces a tiny drift velocity of the lattice nuclei, the magnetic field exerts a transverse Berry force on this drift, and this force is balanced by an entropic restoring force.

AI.tldr: 实验发现晶体SiO₂存在声子热霍尔效应，而非晶态SiO₂没有，表明该效应源于晶体结构而非无序；提出双通道热传导模型解释霍尔响应
AI.motivation: 研究绝缘体中磁场引起的热流与温度梯度不对齐现象（声子热霍尔效应）的起源，解决该领域的实验争议和理论困惑
AI.method: 使用相同实验装置和温度计，对比研究晶体（石英）和非晶态（二氧化硅）SiO₂的纵向和横向热输运特性
AI.result: 晶体样品检测到有限信号，非晶样品无信号；更纯净晶体热霍尔电导率更大，排除无序驱动效应；两个晶体样品横向热电阻率幅度几乎相同
AI.conclusion: 声子热霍尔效应源于晶体结构，可用双通道热传导模型解释：当两个通道在熵产生和磁场耦合上存在差异时，能量流与熵流不再平行，产生霍尔响应

title: Atomistic theory of the phonon angular momentum Hall effect
summary: The spin and orbital Hall effects convert longitudinal charge currents into transverse flows of electronic angular momentum. Here we develop an atomistic theory of the recently proposed lattice-vibrational analogue, in which a longitudinal heat current driven by a thermal gradient is converted into a transverse current of phonon angular momentum. We derive a microscopic real-space expression for this current and show that it originates from thermally induced mixing of polarized vibrational motion, leading to a characteristic edge accumulation of phonon angular momentum. We demonstrate the effect in minimal square- and honeycomb-lattice models and compute the resulting phonon angular momentum accumulations for a range of example materials using input from first-principles calculations. Our results confirm that the phonon angular momentum Hall effect is a universal response of crystalline solids and our framework is generically applicable to all materials.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了声子角动量霍尔效应的微观理论，将纵向热流转换为横向声子角动量流，并证明这是晶体材料的普遍响应。
AI.motivation: 自旋和轨道霍尔效应可以将纵向电荷电流转换为横向电子角动量流。本文旨在研究其晶格振动类比效应，即纵向热流如何转换为横向声子角动量流。
AI.method: 开发了原子尺度的微观理论，推导了实空间声子角动量流的表达式，建立了最小方晶格和蜂窝晶格模型，并基于第一性原理计算计算了多种材料的声子角动量积累。
AI.result: 理论表明该效应源于热诱导的极化振动混合，导致声子角动量在边缘特征性积累。计算证实声子角动量霍尔效应是晶体固体的普遍响应。
AI.conclusion: 声子角动量霍尔效应是晶体材料的普遍现象，所建立的框架可广泛应用于所有材料的研究。

title: Lead-free antiperovskite derivatives Ba$_3$MA$_3$ (M = P, As, Sb, Bi; A = Cl, Br, I): Next-gen materials for optoelectronics
summary: Antiperovskite derivatives have recently emerged as promising lead-free alternatives to halide perovskites for optoelectronic applications. Here, using a comprehensive first-principles calculations including density functional perturbation theory and many-body perturbation theory (involving GW and Bethe-Salpeter equation (BSE)), we investigate the stability, excitonic, polaronic, and optoelectronic properties of cubic Ba$_3$MA$_3$ (M = P, As, Sb, Bi; A = Cl, Br, I). These compounds are found to be dynamically and thermodynamically stable direct-gap semiconductors with G$_0$W$_0$@PBE+SOC band gaps spanning 1.23-2.17 eV. BSE calculations reveal moderate exciton binding energies (0.254-0.352 eV) and intermediate-radius excitons, while Fröhlich polaron analysis indicates intermediate carrier-phonon coupling and mobilities up to $\sim$ 75 cm$^{2}$V$^{-1}$s$^{-1}$. The resulting spectroscopic limited maximum efficiencies reach $\sim$ 19-32%, surpassing several lead-based perovskites. Our results establish Ba-based antiperovskite derivatives as a robust, eco-friendly platform for next-generation optoelectronic devices.

AI.tldr: 通过第一性原理计算研究了立方Ba₃MA₃（M=P, As, Sb, Bi; A=Cl, Br, I）反钙钛矿衍生物，发现它们是稳定的直接带隙半导体，具有中等激子结合能和载流子迁移率，光电转换效率达19-32%，超越多种铅基钙钛矿。
AI.motivation: 反钙钛矿衍生物作为无铅替代品在光电器件中展现出潜力，但对其稳定性、激子、极化子和光电性质缺乏系统研究。
AI.method: 采用第一性原理计算，包括密度泛函微扰理论和多体微扰理论（GW和Bethe-Salpeter方程），研究立方Ba₃MA₃的结构稳定性、激子性质、极化子效应和光电性能。
AI.result: 这些化合物是动态和热力学稳定的直接带隙半导体，带隙1.23-2.17 eV；激子结合能0.254-0.352 eV；载流子迁移率最高约75 cm²V⁻¹s⁻¹；光谱限制最大效率达19-32%，优于多种铅基钙钛矿。
AI.conclusion: 钡基反钙钛矿衍生物是稳健、环保的下一代光电器件平台，具有替代铅基钙钛矿的潜力。

title: Altermagnetism and Room-Temperature Metal-to-Insulator Transition in CsCr$_2$S$_2$O
summary: Metal-to-insulator transitions (MITs), particularly near room temperature, have been extensively studied in nonmagnetic and conventional ferromagnetic and antiferromagnetic systems, yet the co-emergence of MIT and altermagnetism (AM) remains unexplored. Here, a layered chromium-based compound CsCr$_2$S$_2$O that realizes this coexistence was synthesized. It crystalizes in CeCr$_2$Si$_2$C-type structure with Cr moments orders in a C-type antiferromagnetic configuration below $T_\mathrm{N}$ = 326 K, constituting a room-temperature d-wave altermagnet. In the altermagnetic state, a subsequent Verwey-type MIT appears at $T_\mathrm{MI}$ = 305 K, driven by a tetragonal-to-orthorhombic structural distortion and stripe charge ordering of Cr$^{+2}$/Cr$^{+3}$ ions, while maintaining its altermagnetic character. First-principles calculations show moment-dependent spin-split electronic structures with maximum splitting energies of ~0.6 eV and ~0.3 eV in the metallic and insulating states, respectively. Our work links the two prominent phenomena, MIT and AM, in a single material, establishing a new platform for potential spintronic applications.

AI.tldr: 在CsCr₂S₂O中发现室温d波交变磁性与金属-绝缘体转变共存，为自旋电子学提供新平台
AI.motivation: 金属-绝缘体转变（MIT）在非磁性和传统铁磁/反铁磁系统中已有广泛研究，但MIT与交变磁性（AM）的共存现象尚未被探索。本研究旨在寻找并研究同时具有这两种现象的材料。
AI.method: 合成了层状铬基化合物CsCr₂S₂O，该材料在CeCr₂Si₂C型结构中结晶。通过实验测量其磁性和电输运性质，并结合第一性原理计算分析其电子结构。
AI.result: CsCr₂S₂O在TN=326K以下呈现C型反铁磁有序，构成室温d波交变磁体。在交变磁态中，TMI=305K时出现Verwey型金属-绝缘体转变，由四方-正交结构畸变和Cr²⁺/Cr³⁺离子的条纹电荷有序驱动，同时保持交变磁性特征。计算显示金属态和绝缘态分别具有~0.6eV和~0.3eV的最大自旋分裂能。
AI.conclusion: 该工作首次将金属-绝缘体转变和交变磁性这两个重要现象在单一材料中联系起来，为潜在的自旋电子学应用建立了新平台。

title: Terahertz optical activity near crystal field transitions of Tm3+ ions in magnetoelectric alumoborates
summary: Crystal field (CF) excitations in the ground multiplet $^3H_6$ of Tm$^{3+}$ ions were investigated using terahertz transmission spectra of magnetoelectric TmAl$_3$(BO$_3$)$_4$ and Tm$_{0.05}$Yb$_{0.1}$Y$_{0.85}$Al$_3$(BO$_3$)$_4$. These excitations were identified as mainly magnetic dipole transitions from the ground singlet A$_1$ to the next excited doublet E, split by the crystal field of the D$_3$ symmetry. The fine structure of the modes was resolved at low temperatures. It manifested differently in lightly doped and in pure Tm borates, consistent with different distortions of the local crystal field with the D$_3$ symmetry. Strong natural optical activity was observed near the CF transitions resulting in a polarization plane rotation up to 25 degrees. The optical activity is quantitatively described by contributions of magnetic and electric dipole transitions to dynamic magnetoelectric susceptibility and taking into account the classification of local distortions.

AI.tldr: 研究通过太赫兹光谱分析了TmAl₃(BO₃)₄和掺杂样品中Tm³⁺离子的晶体场激发，观察到强自然光学活性，并建立了局部畸变与光学活性之间的定量关系。
AI.motivation: 研究Tm³⁺离子在D₃对称性晶体场中的激发态特性，特别是晶体场畸变对能级结构和光学活性的影响，以及磁电材料中的自然光学活性现象。
AI.method: 使用太赫兹透射光谱技术，对比分析纯TmAl₃(BO₃)₄和掺杂Tm₀.₀₅Yb₀.₁Y₀.₈₅Al₃(BO₃)₄样品，在低温下解析晶体场激发的精细结构。
AI.result: 观察到从基态单重态A₁到激发双重态E的磁偶极跃迁，在低掺杂和纯样品中表现出不同的精细结构模式，表明局部晶体场畸变不同。在晶体场跃迁附近观测到高达25度的偏振面旋转，显示出强自然光学活性。
AI.conclusion: Tm³⁺离子的晶体场激发主要源于磁偶极跃迁，其精细结构受局部晶体场畸变影响。强自然光学活性可通过动态磁电极化率中的磁偶极和电偶极跃迁贡献定量描述，并与局部畸变分类一致。

title: AlloyVAE: A generative model for complex probabilistic field-to-field relationships in alloys
summary: The inherent compositional heterogeneity of multi-principal element alloys (MPEAs) gives rise to complex, spatially varying mechanical fields that cannot be uniquely determined from coarse-grained composition descriptors. This non-uniqueness introduces intrinsically probabilistic structure-property relationships, posing a fundamental challenge to conventional deterministic modeling and machine learning approaches that collapse such mappings into average predictions. Here, we present AlloyVAE, a physics-informed generative framework that learns the full conditional distribution of mechanical fields from microstructural inputs. Built upon a conditional variational autoencoder architecture, the model incorporates learned smoothing operators to enhance functional regularity and a self-consistency mechanism to enforce physical plausibility. Trained on atomistic simulation data, AlloyVAE accurately predicts distributions of residual stress fields from composition and short-range order, and enables the generation of multiple physically consistent realizations under identical input conditions. Beyond forward prediction, the framework supports inverse design by optimizing composition fields to achieve targeted mechanical responses, and is extensible to coupled mappings involving eigenstrain. By capturing one-to-many structure-property relationships in heterogeneous materials, this work establishes a probabilistic paradigm for materials modeling and design, providing a scalable alternative to conventional simulations for navigating high-dimensional compositional spaces.

AI.tldr: AlloyVAE：一种物理信息生成框架，用于学习多主元合金中机械场的完整条件分布，解决结构-性能关系的概率性挑战
AI.motivation: 多主元合金的成分异质性导致复杂的空间变化机械场，无法从粗粒度成分描述符唯一确定。这种非唯一性引入了内在概率性的结构-性能关系，对传统的确定性建模和机器学习方法构成根本挑战。
AI.method: 基于条件变分自编码器架构，结合学习平滑算子增强函数规律性，以及自洽机制确保物理合理性。使用原子模拟数据进行训练。
AI.result: AlloyVAE能够准确预测从成分和短程有序度到残余应力场的分布，并在相同输入条件下生成多个物理一致的真实化结果。支持通过优化成分场实现目标机械响应的逆向设计。
AI.conclusion: 该工作通过捕捉异质材料中的一对多结构-性能关系，建立了材料建模和设计的概率范式，为探索高维成分空间提供了可扩展的替代方案。

title: Loop-level surrogate modeling of dopant-distribution effects in Ba(Zr,Ti)O$_3$
summary: Barium titanate-based perovskites are important candidates for lead-free dielectric and electromechanical technologies. In Zr-substituted BaTiO$_3$ (BZT), functional behavior is usually discussed in terms of the average Zr concentration, while the influence of dopant spatial distribution beyond average concentration is less understood and difficult to explore systematically. Here we present an accelerated materials-design workflow that links controlled dopant distributions to full field-driven response curves. We generate a broad set of Zr distributions spanning a continuum of nanoscale arrangements, with layers, rods, dots, and lamellae serving as representative end-member motifs, and encode each configuration using a compact, parametrized descriptor model. Effective-Hamiltonian molecular dynamics is used to compute polarization-electric-field and strain-field hysteresis loops, and we train a conditional autoencoder surrogate to predict complete loops directly from the distribution parameters. This surrogate enables rapid screening and dense, property-selective design maps at scales that are not feasible with direct simulations alone, and it supports targeted follow-up simulations in regions of interest. Using the predicted loop database, we screen the distribution space for multiple functional targets, including energy-storage performance, electromechanical response, and switching behavior, and identify the corresponding dopant distribution motif families. The resulting design maps show that dopant distribution is an independent tuning parameter that can strongly affect hysteresis behavior and loop-derived figures of merit: layer-like motifs, vertical lamellae, and nanoplate-like inclusions emerge in different performance regimes. More generally, predicting full response curves enables screening of other loop-derived targets and multi-objective design in substituted ferroelectrics.

AI.tldr: 开发了一个加速材料设计工作流，通过控制锆掺杂分布来预测铁电材料的完整场驱动响应曲线，实现快速筛选和性能优化设计。
AI.motivation: 在锆掺杂钛酸钡(BZT)材料中，功能性能通常只考虑平均掺杂浓度，而掺杂空间分布的影响缺乏系统研究。需要开发方法探索掺杂分布对功能行为的系统性影响。
AI.method: 1) 生成涵盖纳米尺度排列的广泛锆分布集合（层状、棒状、点状、片状等）；2) 使用参数化描述符模型编码每个配置；3) 采用有效哈密顿分子动力学计算极化-电场和应变-场滞回曲线；4) 训练条件自编码器替代模型直接从分布参数预测完整滞回曲线。
AI.result: 建立了能够快速筛选和生成密集性能选择性设计图的替代模型，识别出不同功能目标对应的掺杂分布模式家族。层状、垂直片状和纳米板状夹杂物在不同性能区域中表现出优势。
AI.conclusion: 掺杂分布是一个独立的调谐参数，能显著影响滞回行为和性能指标。该方法支持其他滞回曲线衍生目标的多目标设计，为替代铁电材料提供了系统设计框架。
